MATALIKILO  
Kutalika kwiiya kubelesya ncotwaamba mucikuwa kuti ‘Competence Based Curriculum’ 
caleta kwiiya kucincide kwaluzyibo lwakucita zyiyandika kupa kuli basicikolo kubelesya 
zyakucita zyiyandika mazuba aciindi cino kwiiya nikwaunka mujulu, calo citondezya ntaamu 
yakucinca mukusumpula lwiiyo mucisi.  
Bbuku lyakubelesya kuyiisya Mulaka wa Chitonga (Teaching Module) kuli basicikolo bali 
mu Foomu 1 muciiyo ca Mulaka, lyakalembwa kutobela muzeezo wa Competence Based 
Curriculum, walo uswaanganya lwiiyo olu azyintu zyicitika mubuumi bwini bwamuntu.  
Zyintu zyeelede kucitwa (General Competences) zyakabikkwa mubbuku lijisi zyalwiiyo 
mucisi lya 2023 Curriculum Framework zyili swaanganinzyidwe abbuku eeli.  
Eeli bbuku lilaa muzeezo wakugwasyilizya bamayi bayiisya basicikolo ba Foomu 1 
mukuyiisya kubelesya Competence Based Curriculum, muciindi mabbuku aayelede 
kubelesyegwa naatana lembwa.  Eeci citondezya kulyaaba kuliko kuzwa kumutabi walwiiyo 
kutegwa caba cintu cuubauba kuli bamayi kuyiisya basicikolo.  Nokuba boobo bamayi 
balakulwaizyigwa kuzuzikizya bbuku eeli lyakubelesya kuyiisya kwiinda mubuvwuntauzi 
bwabo beni kutegwa bazuzikizye myaako iinga yajanika ciindi cakuyiisya.  
    
Kelvin Mambwe (Dr)  
Permanent Secretary – Educational Services

5 
 
KULUMBA  
Lwiiyo lwakutaanguna lwakwiiya Mulaka wa Chitonga mu Foomu 1 nkuzwidilila 
kwakubuzyanya-buzyanya abasikutola lubazu banji mumutabi akunze aamutabi uulanganya 
lwiiyo mucisi.  
Bantu banji, zyikolo ambunga zyinji zyakabuzyigwa kutegwa zyaambe mbozyiyeeya 
kujatikizya kwiiya Mulaka wa Chitonga kwiinda mukwiiya kwakucita zyintu naa 
Competence Based Curriculum.  Mutabi uulanganya lwiiyo uyanda kupa kulumba kuli baabo 
boonse bakotola lubazu kupa twaambo twalo twakagwasyilizya kutegwa bbuku eeli 
lyakubelesya kuyiisya ba Foomu 1 lilembwe.  
Kumamanino ndiyanda kulumba mbunga yababelesi babeleka ku Curriculum Development 
Centre, balo bunkutwe bwabo bwakabelesyegwa bweelede kubona masimpe kuti kulemba 
bbuku eeli kwamaninzyigwa bweelede.  
  
  
Charles K. Ndakala (Dr).  
Director Curriculum Development  
MINISTRY OF EDUCATION

NTALISYO   
Bbuku lyakubelesya kugwasyilizya bamayi kuyiisya mu Foomu 1 (Teaching module) 
lyakalembwa kugwasyilizya bamayi kuyiisya bweelede ciiyo ca Mulaka wa Chitonga 
kubelesya nzila yakuyiisya mpya.  
Bbuku   eeli lyakalembwa kutobelezya kuzuminanwa kwakacitika kwakubelesya kucita 
zyintu naa Competence Based Syllabus.  Muzeezo ngwakusola kubaa cakubelesya kuyiisya 
muciindi nokutana lembwa mabbuku aakubelesya akupa basikuyiisya zyakubelesya zyini, 
zyakucita alimwi akulingula kutobelezya basicikolo mpobateene alimwi anzyobayanda.  
Mutabi uulanganya lwiiyo mucisi ulizyi buyumu-yumu buboola kwiinda mukucinca nzila 
yalwiiyo kuya kuli imbi, yalo eeyi njakucikonzya kucita zyintu naa Competence Based mu 
Chikuwa.  Kusala nzila yakucizyiba kucita zyintu naa Competence Based Curriculum (CBC) 
nintaamu mpati yakucinca kusumpula lwiiyo luyandika.  Eeli bbuku litondezya kulyaaba 
kuliko kuzwa kumutabi uulanganya zyalwiiyo kutegwa cibe cintu cuubauba kuli bamayi, 
kutegwa bapegwe malailile, zyakucita zyiyeeyelwa, akulingula basicikolo kweendelanya 
amizeezo ya CBC. Nokuba boobo, bamayi balakulwaizyigwa kuzuzikizya bbuku eeli 
kwiinda mubuvwuntauzi bwabo beni kutegwa bazuzikizye myaako iinga yajanika ciindi 
cakuyiisya.  
Zyakucita zyapegwa akulingula kwapegwa mubbuku eeli zyiyandika kupa zyakucita zyini 
aluzyibo lwakuyeeyesya kuli basicikolo kumwi kacibapa kulimvwa bupati akucikonzya 
kucinca kutobela zyintu zyipya zyijatikizya kwiiya kucikolo.  Bamayi balakulwaizyigwa 
kubelesya lugwasyo lupegwa, kutobelezya zyintu nzyobacita mumakkilasi aabo, kutegwa 
kabakonzya kubelesya nzila zyimbi, zyizuminika kuti kwayandika.  Ooku kucikonzya 
kucincauzya boobu ncitu cipati kukucita kuti basicikolo boonse, kufwumbwa nkobabede, 
batambule bubotu kuzwa kulwiiyo lubelesyegwa.  
Kuyeeyelwa kuti bbuku eeli ciyakuba cibelesyo cipati kuli bamayi ciindi nobabelesya 
zyakucita zyeelede naa Competence Based Curriculum, kusumpula kucikonzya kupa lwiiyo 
lweelede, luzyibo akubikkila maanu ayandika kusola kuleta nzila yalwiiyo iisumpukid  
BBUKU EELI MBOLYEELEDE KUBELESYEGWA  
Eeli bbuku lyakubelesya kuyiisya (Teaching Module) lijisi zyakuyiisya zyeelede kuyiisyigwa 
kuli ba Foomu 1 muteemu 2.  Lilibikkidwe muzyibeela eezyi: Kuswiilila akukanana, kubala, 
mabala, kumvwisisisya kubala akulemba.  Zyakwiiya zyili mubbuku eeli tazyili zyiiyo, pele 
inga zyabelesyegwa kubamba zyiiyo. Ciindi cakulemba zyiiyo, inga mwabelesya zyakwiiya 
kuzwa muzyibeela zyiindene – indene kulemba ciiyo comwe.  Mukozyanyo: Muciiyo comwe 
inga kwajanika kuswiilila akukanana, mabala, kubala akulemba. Nolemba ciiyo, weelede 
kusala tubeela twakuyiisya ntoyelede kubikkila maanu kuyiisya, azyakucita zyeelede kucita 
basicikolo kuceelede kucita (Specific Competence) acimwi.  Nkokwaamba kuti acimwi ciiyo 
cilakonzya kubaa ceelede kucitwa ciinda kuli comwe.

9 
 
Nokuba boobo, weelede kuzyiba cibeela ceelede kupegwa ciindi cinji muciiyo eeco.  
Kuyungizya, zyakucita zyabasicikolo zyipedwe kuli ceelede kucitwa acimwi, tazyeelede 
kumaninzyigwa muciiyo comwe.  Eezyi inga zyacitwa muzyiiyo zyiindene-indene.  
BWAKUYIISYA BULOMBOZYEGWA  
Kuyiisya kweelede kutobela muzeezo mu Chikuwa ngobati, Gradual Release Model (GRM).  
Mwiiyi weelede kucita cakucita, mpoona weelede kucita cakucita eeci abasicikolo, mpoona 
kumamanino, basicikolo beelede kucita cakucita eeci balikke.  Kunze kwaboobo mwiiyi 
weelede kubelesya nzila zyiindene-indene kuyiisya kutegwa wacikonzya kugwasyilizya 
basicikolo baindene-indene.

11 
 
MUZEEZO 1: MIBANDI 
1. Ntalisyo  
 Buyale: 
Cibeela eeci cilanganya mibandi. Cilalanganya milawo iitobelwa mumubandi; nkokuti 
mbokubandikwa, nokubandikwa ancokubandikilwa. Mumuzeezo nguwenya ooyu, kuli 
akubala kwakawiiwi akubala kwakupozya. Kwamana boobo, wiiya weelede kukonzya 
kubikka cabandikwa mubulembo, nkokuti nkwiiya kulemba mulaso. Mukuzwidilizya 
muzeezo ooyu, mulaka uuluzi ulayandika kubelesya awalo. Akaambo kaako, mazyina, 
kusandulula cibalo kuzwa mumulaka umwi kutola muli uumwi atusimyo tulalanganyizyigwa 
mucibeela eeci. 
KUSWIILILA AKUKANANA 
Mutwe: Mubandi  
Mutwe Musyoonto: Kukanana Kwakukazyanya 
 Ntalisyo: Eeci cibeela cilanganya milawo iitobelwa mukuswiilila akukanana; 
mbokukananwa ambokuvwiilwa. 
 Ceelede Kucitwa: Bandika mukukazyanya kufwumbwa kaambo kapegwa. 
Cakucita 1: 
Akati kamitwe yapegwa, sala ubape basicikolo ngobatiibandike mukukazyanya. 
1. Mwana wasika aciimo camyaka kkumi alusele weelede kuzwa abazyali akulizyibila 
bwakupona. 
2. Milimo yabantu njiyanyonganya kuunga kwamyuuwo mujulu. 
3. Bantu bajatwa akaambo kakubelesya misamu iikola beelede kwaangwa kwamyaka 
iitaleli kumakumi obilo. 
4. Bazyali, kutali bamayi, mbabanyonganya bana. 
 
Mwiiyi: 
- 
Pandulula milawo iitobelwa mukukazyanya mizeezo. 
- 
Bikka basicikolo mutubunga tobilo. 
- 
Bape mutwe wakaambo ngobatiikazyanye basicikolo. 
- 
Kopa tubunga ciindi cakulibambila akubikka twaambo antoomwe. 
- 
Zumizya basicikolo kutalika kukazyanya. 
- 
Bona kuti mubandi uli mumuzeezo wapegwa. 
- 
Lemba twaambo tupati-pati tubandikwa.  
- 
Sindinganya twaambo ntoolemba kumamanino aakukazyanya.

-

Mukozyanyo: Bbala: Cilabila 
Kaambo: Mebo yawe lyoonse inga ndiba acilabila, ndiide kuyeeya nduwe. 
Bulangizi Bweelede: Mabala asalwa abelesyegwa mutwaambo buluzi. 
 
Mutwe 2: Kusindinganya Kubala 
Mutwe Musyoonto: Kumvwisisisya Kubala 
 Ntalisyo: Eeci cibeela cilanganya kubala kwakumvwisisisya. Basicikolo balabala 
cibalo akucimvwisisisya, balavwiila mibuzyo yaandeene akufwiinsya cibalo citiibalwe. 
 Ceelede Kucitwa: Bala zyibalo zyeelede mu Foomu 1 zyiindene-indene 
cakumvwisisisya. 
Mwiiyi: 
- 
Ambila basicikolo kaambo antela kaano kajatikizya cibalo ncobayanda kubala. 
- 
Bape mbaakani zyakubala, mbuli kwiingula mibuzyo akufwiinsya cibalo. 
- 
Baambile ntalisyo yacibalo atumwi buyo twaambo tuyandisi. 
- 
Ciindi cakubala, bazuminzye basicikolo kuti balibalile cibalo naa baswiilizye kuli 
umwi sikupozya kubala. 
- 
Imika kubala cibalo mumasena mumwi muli twaambo tupati-pati akubabuzya mibuzyo 
naa kusalazya twaambo, ubakulwaizye kwaambaula zyatwaambo otu. 
- 
Babuzye mibuzyo ubone kuti naa balacimvwa ncibabala. 
- 
Bamana kubala balombe kuti bafwiinsye cibalo kwiinda mukwaamba twaambo tupati-
pati tuzwa mucibalo. 
- 
Babuzye mibuzyo iiyanda bwiinguzi bufwaafwi ayiilya iyanda bwiinguzi bulamfwu 
bwakuyeeyesya. 
- 
Bagwasyilizye kuswaanganya cibalo ncibabala azyicitika mumaumi aabo naa zyicitika 
munyika. 
- 
Ulakonzya kubabuzya mibuzyo muciindi cakwiiya (kutegwa uzyibe mpobeendela) naa 
kubapa cakucita kumamanino aaciiyo. 
Kuyungizya kumaccililanwa alaatala awa, ulakonzya: 
- 
Kutondezya basicikolo zyifwanikiso azyimwi buyo zyakweebela mukubagwasyilizya 
kuti bamvwe cibalo ncobabala. 
- 
Ulakonzya kubelesya tusobano kutegwa basicikolo bamvwisisisye cibalo.

14 
 
 
 
Cakucita 1: Kubala Cibalo 
Mwiiyi: 
- 
Kopa cibalo kuti babale basicikolo. 
(Inga wabelesya cibalo eeci capegwa naanka kubelesya cimbi biyo nconga wajana ceelela mu 
Foomu 1). 
“Nobantu kamunga kamusaanguna kulilanga mucimbonimboni, naa kacitako, walanga 
mumeenda biyo kutegwa walibona mbobede. Kasimpe yebo Mazuba inga waimika ndime! 
Nkoonya kwiimika kwalo kulaamba kuti tatuli aceelekelo comwe pe. Unyina ansoni 
kundisibila mulosi mebo! Ndili kabwa kako? Kamunga kamulisenda nobantu kaka; koya ooko 
ukasibile tubwanyoko milosi, kutali ndime.” Wakaamba mwana waba Haazele, Mutinta 
kumwi kazinguluka kutegwa Mazuba abone biya kuti wakaliyumwide. Masimpe kufwumbwa 
nkoomulangila Mutinta wakali kuliitila, yakali nseete yamusimbi. 
Aaya oonse akacitika buzuba nikwakali mucado amunzi aakwabo Mazuba. Ooyu Mazuba 
wakali wamaanga amusimbi wakali kukwatwa kumwana waba Siakapongo. Lino ngooyu 
wamukwaapula amunzi wakwabo musimbi ngwaakali kuyanda cakuti lyoonse wakali kuba 
acilabila kuyeeya nguwe. Kwaciindi cilamfwu, wakali kusobelela akweenkela nkaambo 
wakanyina bwakumunjila Mutinta. 
“Kutakusisa Mutinta, inga waamba kufwumbwa ncoyanda kwaamba, mebo baama ndime 
Nsejokimunsi, tufwida antoomwe anduwe. Ndilizyi kuti bumwi buzuba uya kulityoloola 
kumbele lyangu mbuli mulumi wako. Alo twaakuti twakkala azyuuno amucado wesu, koide 
koongoonga onabwiinga! Mutinta, atubandike mwanaa baama, tubambe munzi. Langa 
twakomena, ciindi cakusobana taciciko pe.”  
Nozyicitika zyoonse ezyi, bantu bakalisikide kale, bavwoomana kuti babone akumvwa cakali 
kucitika. Mwati wakakombelela Mazuba kuti kwakali bantu, mbwaakavwatukila wakeenda 
kugama akaimvwi Mutinta akuyakufwugama kumwi katambika nweenwe kuli Mutinta. Bantu 
bakali 
kweebelezya 
bakatalika 
kukambilila 
cakulumbaizya. 
Mpoona-mpoona 
eeci 
cakamucinca Mutinta, wakazibauka, walungumana mujulu mbuli kuti wakamvwa wiita 
mujulu kumwi kaulu kalalyata-lyata ansi. Naakalanga ansi, wajana Mazuba ulifwugeme 
kumwi utambikide nweenwe. 
Mutinta wakaba mbuli muntu wali mumudima mpoona kwaide kugweemuka mpabede. 
Wakasotooka kumwi kakwiila akutambika kwaanza kutegwa Mazuba amusamike nweenwe. 
“Ndazumina Mazuba, atukwatane.”   
Bulangizi Bweelede: Cibalo cibeelede cabalwa buyandika.  
 
Cakucita 2: Kwiingula mibuzyo yaandeene-andeene. 
Mwiiyi:  
- 
Ambila basicikolo kwiingula mibuzyo yapegwa: 
1. Lemba mabala otatwe aali mucibalo aatondezya kuti Mutinta wakali mubotu kapati. 
2. Twaambo nzi tutondezya kuti Mazuba wakatalikide kaindi kulombozya Mutinta? 
3. Mazuba wakatondezya kuti talibambilide kuleka kuyanda Mutinta. Ncinzi citondezya 
boobu?

15 
 
4. Ncinzi cakali kucitika abusena awa mpubakajanika ba Mazuba a Mutinta? 
5. Ncitondezyo nzi ncaakapa Mazuba caluyando ndwaakajisi kumusimbi? 
6. Mulembi naamba kuti ‘wakaliyumwide’ wakalikwaamba nzi? 
Bulangizi Bweelede: Mibuzyo yaingulwa buluzi. 
 
 Cakucita 3: Kufwiinsya cibalo cabalwa 
Mwiiyi:  
- 
Ambila basicikolo kuti:  
i. Baambe bubotu bwakufwiinsya zyibalo. 
ii. Baambaule nzila zyakufwiinsya cibalo nzyobazyi. 
iii. Kufwiinsya kujisi buyo twaambo tupati-pati tujisi muzeezo wacibalo. 
iv. Twaambo twanomoonwa kuzwa mucibalo tatweelede kucinca muzeezo 
kweendelanya amubuzyo. 
v. Cibalo cafwiinsyigwa cilembwa mukampango komwe buyo. 
Ntaamu Zyitobelwa 
i. 
Nkubala cibalo ciindi cakusaanguna kutegwa uulemba aciteelele. 
ii. 
Kubala ciindi cabili kutegwa ujane twaambo tupati-pati tuyandika. 
iii. 
Kubikka twaambo mumatobelanwa ayelede. 
iv. 
Kubala mweelwe wamabala kutegwa naa waindilila twaambo tuteelede 
tuzwe. 
        Zyilangilwa kuli sicikolo  
i. Kucizyiba kubala akulemba. 
ii. Kumvwisisisya ncabala antela cabalwa. 
iii. Kuzyiba zyibeela zyijisi twaambo ntwayanda mucibalo. 
iv. Kucizyiba kunomoona twaambo akutulemba apepa limbi. 
v. Kucizyiba kuti mikozyanyo yapegwa mucibalo tayeelede kubamba kaambo. 
vi. Kucizyiba kututobelanya twaambo kubelesya manambala, tweengo antela 
tudombwi. 
Bulangizi Bweelede: Cibalo cabalwa cafwiinsyigwa buluzi. 
Cakucita 4: Kwaamba cibalo cabalwa mumabala abo. 
Mwiiyi:  
- 
Ambila basicikolo kufwiinsya cibalo cabalwa mumabala abo. 
Bulangizi Bweelede: Cibalo cabalwa cafwiinsyigwa mumabala abo buyandika.

16 
 
Cakucita 5: Kubandika Mabala Ncaamba 
Mwiiyi:  
- 
Lemba mabala mapati-pati aazwa mucibalo. 
- 
Ambila basicikolo kuti bayungizye mabala ngobatazyi ngibajana nibali kubala.  
- 
Ambila basicikolo kuti, mutubunga naa kkilasi yoonse babandike akwaamba mabala 
azwa mucibalo ncaamba. 
Bulangizi Bweelede: Mabala ncaamba abandikwa buyandika. 
 
Mutwe 3: Kubala Kwakupozya 
Mutwe Musyoonto: Kutabbabbalisya Kubala 
 Ntalisyo: 
Basicikolo 
balaiya 
kubala 
kwakupozya 
cakutabbabbalika. 
Eeci 
cilabagwasya kukonzya kubala twaambo bweelede kubantu baswiilila. Kunze aboobo, 
cilabagwasya akutobela mulawo weelede ciindi muntu nabala cakupozya. Kubala 
kwakupozya kulagwasyilizya abaabo basicikolo batacizyi kabotu kubala ciindi 
nobaswiilizya bamwi kababala mabala atwaambo tubakatazya kubala lwabo beni. 
Mukuzyiba kuti amwi mabala aindana buyo mbwaabalwa pesi kulemba alikonzyenye, 
uubala ulagwasilizya baswiilizya kuzyiba caambwa kwiinda mukwaamba kabotu 
mabala, mbuli bbala ‘yasya’. Uubala weelede kutondezya kwiinda mbuli mbwagusya 
jwi ncaamba.  
Mukonzyanyo: Muleya wakayasya ganda lipati. 
                            Muleya wakayasya mulilo naakayanda kujika. 
Ceelede Kucitwa: Bala zyibalo zyeelede mu Foomu 1 zyiindene-indene cakutabbabbalisya. 
Cakucita 1: Kupozya kubala cakufwambaana, munzila yeelede akutabbabbalisya. 
Mwiiyi: 
- 
Bala kampango komwe kacibalo kutegwa basicikolo bamvwe mbokubalwa kabotu. 
- 
Ambila basicikolo milawo yakubala mbuli: bwakujata bbuku, kutobelezya        
twaandaanyo, bweende bwajwi, kutatondeka minwe, kuteenzya mutwe, ayimwi 
milawo yataambwa awa. 
- 
Ambila basicikolo balibalile cibalo kutobela milawo yapegwa. 
Bulangizi Bweelede: Cibalo cabalwa cakupozya cakutabbabbalisya.

17 
 
Cakucita 2: Kwiingula mibuzyo yakwaambaula. 
Mwiiyi: 
- 
Buzya basicikolo mibuzyo yakwaambaula  
- 
Bonesesya kuti boonse basicikolo baingula mibuzyo mukwaambaula. 
Bulangizi Bweelede: Mibuzyo yakwaambaula yaingulwa buyandika. 
KULEMBA  
Mutwe: Mulaso 
Mutwe Musyoonto: Kuluula 
 Ntalisyo: Eeci cibeela cilanganya kulemba mulaso wazyaano zyakulengelezya. 
Cilalanganya bube azyijanika mucaano, antoomwe akwiindanya misyobo yazyaano 
zyamasimpe azyakulengelezya.  
2. Ceelede Kucitwa: Lemba zyaano zyakulengelezya. 
Cakucita 1: Kubandika bube azyijanika mucaano camasimpe acaano cakulengelezya. 
Mwiiyi: 
- 
Buzya basicikolo ncolyaamba bbala lyakulengelezya. 
- 
Buzya basicikolo lwiindano luliko akati kacaano cakulengelezya acaano camasimpe. 
- 
Sindinganya kupa bupanduluzi akwiindana kuliko akati kacaano cakulengelezya 
acaano camasimpe.  
- 
Lemba zyaano zyifwaafwi zyobilo; cakulengelezya a camasimpe akubuzya baiya 
lwiindano luliko (Eezyi zyaano ulakonzya kuzyilembela limwi kacitanasika ciindi 
cakuyiisya). 
Bulangizi Bweelede: Bube azyijanwa mucaano camasimpe acaano cakulengelezya 
zyabandikwa bweelede. 
Cakucita 2: Kwiindaanya zyaano zyakulengelezya kuli zyamasimpe 
Mwiiyi:  
- 
Belesya mikozyanyo yazyaano njoobapa mukwiindanya zyaano zyakulengelela kuzwa 
kuzyaano zyamasimpe. 
- 
Ambila basicikolo banomoone twaambo tutondezya lwiindano luliko akati kamisyobo 
yazyaano zyapegwa. 
Bulangizi Bweelede: Caano cakulengelezya caandaaninzyigwa kuli camasimpe buyandika.

 Cakucita 3: Lemba mulaso wacaano cakulengelezya 
Mwiiyi: 
- 
Ambila basicikolo kulemba mulaso wakulengelezya. 
- 
Yeezya basicikolo kutobela malailile aajatikizya kulemba mulaso. 
Bulangizi Bweelede: Mulaso wakuluula walembwa buluzi. 
 
 
 MULAKA 
Mutwe 1: Mazyina 
Mutwe Musyoonto:  Bube bwa Zyina 
 Ntalisyo: Eeci cibeela cilanganya bube bwazyina akulyaapaula muzyibeela 
zyandilyo. Luzyibo olu lugwasya wiiya kuzyiba mbwaabelesyegwa mazyina kwiinda 
mukubikka zyibeela zyeelede. 
 Ceelede Kucitwa: Pandulula bube bwa zyina. 
Cakucita 1: Kubandika bube bwazyina 
Mwiiyi:  
- 
Indulula kupandulwida basicikolo misyobo yamazyina yone; Mazyina acigaminina, 
mazyina buyo, mazyina abungika amazyina atabonwi. 
- 
Buzya basicikolo naa kuli ncobazyi kujatikizya bube bwazyina. 
- 
Pandulula mbobwiindene bube bwamazyina amaciti, kuti:  
i. 
Zyina lijisi zyibeela zyobilo; kakumbatizyo kakumatalikilo acisyiko. 
ii. 
Zyina talijisi kakumbatizyo kumamanino. 
iii. 
Zyina litondezyela kumatalikilo mweelwe, mbuli: 
Kasamu – Tusamu 
Cisani     – Zyisani 
Muntu    – Bantu 
ꝊCula    – Bacula 
 
Bulangizi Bweelede: Bube bwamazyina bwabandikwa buyandika.

- 
Indulula kupandulwida basicikolo kuti zyina lijisi zyibeela zyobilo: kakumbatizyo 
acisiko. Mukozyanyo: Muntu (Kakumbatizyo: Mu-, Cisyiko: -ntu

- 
Pandulula kuti nkwaali mabala naa mazyina atajisi kakumbatizyo pele twaatola

Bulangizi Bweelede: Mazyina apaulwa muzyibeela-beela buluzi. 
Mutwe 2: Maambilambali 
Mutwe Musyoonto: Tusimyo 
 Ntalisyo: Eeci cibeela cilanganya tusimyo. Cilalanganya misyobo ya Tusimyo, ciindi 
notubelesyegwa ancotwaamba nitwabelesyegwa mutwaambo. Eeci cigwasya sicikolo 
kuzyiba nzila zyaandeene zyakubelesya mulaka kwaamba twaambo tusisidwe 
acabusongo. Akaambo kaluzyibo olu, sicikolo uyakubelesya Kasimyo kutegwa 
atatoneki muntu ngwaambila kamwi kaambo kakonzya kumubijila. 
 Ceelede Kucitwa: Belesya tusimyo. 
Cakucita 1: Kubandika ncotwaamba tusimyo akutubelesya. 
Mwiiyi: 
- 
Pandulwida basicikolo bbala lya Kasimyo ncolyaamba. 
- 
Pandulwida basicikolo kuti Kasimyo takabelesyegwi buyo kufwumbwa ciindi, pele 
kabelesyegwa kweendelana acicitika. 
- 
Pa mukonzyanyo wakasimyo aciindi nokabelesyegwa. 
- 
Kopa zyiindi zyisiyene-siyene wamana waambile basicikolo kujana tusimyo tweelede. 
 
 Bulangizi Bweelede: Tusimyo ncotwaamba akubelesyegwa zyabandikwa buyandika. 
Cakucita 2: Kubikka Tusimyo kweendelana ambotubeleka. 
 
Mwiiyi: 
- 
Kopa tusimyo twaandeene-andeene tuli kkumi wamana waambile basicikolo kuti 
baambe ncotweelede kubeleka. 
- 
Kopa mukonzyanyo wakasimyo komwe wamana ulekele basicikolo kwiingula 
twacaala. 
- 
Baapaule basicikolo mutubunga kutegwa bacite mulimo oyu. 
- 
Bamaninzya kucita mulimo oyu mutubunga, abamwi babale bwiinguzi mbubajana. 
- 
Lemba bwiinguzi bwazuminanwa abboodi. 
Bulangizi Bweelede: Tusimyo twaapaulwa buyandika kweendelanya ambotubeleka.

20 
 
Cakucita 3: Kujana tusimyo tweelede kubelesyegwa muzyiindi zyaandeene-andene. 
Mwiiyi: 
- 
Kopa bupanduluzi amuzeezo wamubuzyo wapegwa. Basicikolo abazyibe kuti 
cilangilwa kuli mbabo nkuswaanganya zyiindi atusimyo tubelesyegwa muzyiindi 
eezyo. 
- 
Kopa mukonzyanyo waciindi akasimyo kabelesyegwa ciindi eeco. 
- 
Lemba zyiindi abboodi wamana waambile basicikolo kuti babikke tusimyo 
tweendelana azyiindi zyapegwa.  
Bulangizi Bweelede: Tusimyo tweelede kubelesyegwa muzyiindi zyaandeene-andeene 
twajanwa bweelede. 
Cakucita 4: Kujana zyiindi zyeelede notweelede kubelesya tusimyo twaandeene-
andeene. 
Mwiiyi: 
- 
Pandulwida basicikolo kuti akamwi kasimyo keelede kuba aciindi nokabeleka.  
- 
Kopa kasimyo komwe mbuli mukonzyanyo wamana utondezye ciindi nokeelede 
kubelesyegwa. 
- 
Lemba tusimyo tuli kkumi wamana waambile basicikolo kutondezya zyiindi 
notweelede kubelesyegwa.  
Bulangizi Bweelede: Zyiindi notweelede kubelesyegwa tusimyo zyajanwa buluzi. 
 
KUSANDULULA 
Mutwe: Kusandulula 
Mutwe Musyoonto: Nzila Zyakusandulula. 
 Ntalisyo: cibeela eeci cilanganya mbokusandululwa cibalo kuzwa mumulaka umwi 
kutola mulu uumwi. Ntaamu zyitobelwa mukusandulula zyilapandululwa. 
 Ceelede Kucitwa: Belesya nzila zyaandeene-andeene kusandulula cibalo kuzwa mu

Cakucita: Kusandulula cibalo kuzwa mu Chikuwa kutola mu Chitonga akuzwisya mu 
Chitonga kutola mu Chikuwa kubelesya nzila zyaandeene-andeene. (Kubweza muzeezo 
wacibalo oonse, kugusya mabala atayandiki, kubelesya mabala ataliko mucibalo pele ayelela 
kubelesya, akuulanganya kapati muzeezo wacibalo kutali bube bwamabala.)

21

- 
Pandulwida basicikolo milawo eeyi: 
i. 
Tabeelede kusandula bbala abbala nobasandulula cibalo. 
ii. 
Muzeezo wacibalo taucinci. 
iii. 
Twaandaanyo tweenda antoomwe amulaka, aboobo tweelede kubikkwa 
mpotweelede. 
iv. 
Mazyina acigaminina taacincigwi. 
v. 
Taceelede kuleta twaambo tutako mucibalo camulaka uusandululwa. 
vi. 
Ciindi cibelesyedwe mumulaka usandululwa tacicinci. 
Bulangizi Bweelede Nzila zyaandeene-andeene zyakusandulula cibalo kuzwa mumulaka 
umwi kutola muli uumwi, akujosya zyabelesyegwa bweelede.

MUZEEZO 2: TWAANO 
1. Ntalisyo 
 Buyale 
Muzeezo waciiyo eeci ulanganya twaano. Kwiinda mutwaano, tulakonzya kwaabana 
mizeezo, buponi ambotulimvwa mubukkale bwesu naa bwabamwi. Twaano tulakonzya kuba 
twamasimpe naa twakulengelezya buyo. Tulakonzya kuba twamisela yakainda tucaanwa ano 
mazuba naa tulakonzya kuba twakupunga buyo kuzwa kubuponi bwalino. Twaano 
tulakonzya kwaambwa amulomo, kulembwa mumabbuku naa kubikkwa acipekupeku. 
Kufwumbwa kaano kapegwa kalijisi muzeezo; tumwi tulayiisya, tumwi tulabotelezya kakuli 
tumwi tulakulwaizya. Muzeezo wini watwaano ngwakuleta bantu antoomwe alimwi akupa 
bupanduluzi mubukkale bwabantu. Muciiyo oomu, kulabandikwa mabala ncaamba, 
kufwiinsya cibalo kwiinda mukulemba twaambo mukampango komwe, mulaka (maiminizi 
aamazyina, maambilambali – twaambyo) ambokusandululwa.  
• Cikwelelezya Kuciiyo: Kulengelezya nkucizyiba kubeja!

KUSWIILILA AKUKANANA   
Mutwe: Kwaana  
Mutwe Musyoonto: Twaano Twakulengelezya 
 Ntalisyo: Kwaana twaano twakulengelezya caamba kubamba twaano kwiinda 
mukuyeeyela zyintu mbozyakacitika, mbozyicitika naa mbozyiyoocitika. Twaano 
twakubamba tulakonzya kwaamba zyicitika muzyilengwa zyamisyobo yabantu. 
Misyobo yaandeene-andeene ilijisi twaano twaabanwa mukwaambaula twalo 
tukonzya kuleta lukkomano, lwiiyo antela kutondezya buponi bwamusyobo 
mbobweelede kuzumanana. Eeci cilacitika kwiinda mukutobela zyilengwa 
zyizubululwa mumusyobo oyo. 
Ceelede Kucitwa 1: Ana caano cakulengelezya kubelesya muzeezo wapegwa. 
Cakucita 1: Kwiindanya twaano twamasimpe atwakulengelezya. 
Mwiiyi: 
- 
Ambila basicikolo kuti twaano twakulengelezya twakuyeelela buyo kakuli 
twamasimpe twaamba zyintu zyakacitika naa zyicitika. 
- 
Yungizya kwaambila basicikolo kuti zyintu zyicitika naa masena ambwa mutwaano 
twakulengelezya ngakuyeeyela kakuli zyintu zyicitika, mazyina abantu amasena 
ambwa mutwaano twamasimpe nkwaali mubwini.  
- 
Ambila basicikolo kuti mutwaano twakulengelezya zyintu zyicitika tazyikonzyi 
kucitika mubuumi mbotupona. Zyintu mbuli banyama baambaula azyisamu zyeenda 
tazyicitiki mubuumi mbotupona pele mutwaano twakulengelezya eezyi zyintu 
zyilacitika.  
- 
Ambila basicikolo kuti bunji bwazyiindi, twaano twakulengelezya tulaanwa kutegwa 
tubotelezye bantu naa kubayiisya cimwi cintu kakuli twaano twamasimpe 
tulabelesyegwa kuyiisya bantu akupandulula zyintu.  
Bulangizi Bweelede: Twaano twakulengelezya atwamasimpe twaindanizyigwa bweelede. 
Cakucita 2: Kwaana twaano twakulengelezya. 
Mwiiyi:  
- 
Ana kaano kakulengelezya kabotu- kabotu alimwi kobelesya mabala akonzya 
kukabikka antangalala kaano kako. 
- 
Ciindi noana, bakwelelezye basicikolo kwiinda mukubelesya zyizo zyamubili wako 
mbuli maanza, kucinca kwajwi lyako (kuyumya jwi lyako naa kulitesya), naa 
kubabuzya mibuzyo.  
- 
Buzya basicikolo mibuzyo wamana kwaana kaano.

24 
 
- 
Ambila basicikolo kuti baambe mizeezo yabo, zyiiyo zyobaiya kuzwa kukaano, naa 
kupa mamanino aakaano aindene kuli ngoobapa.  
- 
Ambila basicikolo kuti aumwi ayeeyele kaano akukaamba mbuli mbwakayeeyela. 
- 
Bayeezye kuti kaano kakulengelezya akalo kalapegwa mutwe. 
Bulangizi Bweelede: Twaano twakulengelezya twaanwa bweelede.  
Cakucita 3: Kwaana twaano twamasimpe 
Mwiiyi:  
- 
Ana kaano kamasimpe kazubulula cintu cakacitika, cicitika naa ciyoocitika. 
- 
Ambila basicikolo kuti aumwi ayeeye cintu cakamucitikila, cimucitikila naa 
ciyoomucitikila.  
- 
Ambila basicikolo kuti aumwi ncaayeeya kuti caluulwa naa calembwa nkokuti 
caba caano camasimpe. 
- 
Ambila basicikolo kuti twaambo twabo tutobelane kabotu-kabotu 
mbubwena mbuli zyintu mbuzyakali kuccililana, mbozyiccililana naa 
mbozyiyooccililana. 
- 
Ambila basicikolo kuti aumwi akape mutwe ukeelela kaano kakwe, abusena 
nkukakacitikila, nkokacitikila naa nkokayoocitikila.  
Bulangizi Bweelede: Kaano kamasimpe kaanwa buyandika. 
Ceelede Kucitwa 2: Langa-langa kaano kakulengelezya. 
 Cakucita 1: Kuzyiba bube azyintu zyijanwa mutwaano. 
Mwiiyi:  
- 
Ambila basicikolo kuti kulanganya twaambo tujanwa mutwaano kuyandika 
kuzyiba zyibeela zyipati-pati zyatwaano. 
- 
 Baambile kuti kaano keelede kuti kacijisi matalikilo, akati-kati alimwi 
amamanino: 
i. 
Matalikilo atondezya kaano mbokatalika, kujula mizeezo yakuzyiba 
bantu, zyintu naa banyama bajanika naa baambaulwa mukaano. 
Matalikilo alimwi alapa kaambo kapati kali mukaano.  
ii. 
Akati-kati aakaano tujana kaano mpokaletela mibuzyo 
yakukatazyigwa, kweetezyegwa, kupenga antela kuzumbauzya 
kwaliko.  
iii. 
Mamanino aakaano azubulula kaano mbokamana, mpotujana 
kwiingulwa mbuli mbozyeenda zyintu ambozyaba kumamanino. 
Bulangizi Bweelede: Bube azyintu zyintu zyijanwa mutwaano zyazyibwa 
buyandika.

25 
 
Cakucita 2: Kulanga-langa zyiiyo cijanwa mutwaano.  
Mwiiyi:  
- 
Buzya basicikolo zyibeela zyatwaano azyiiyo zyijanwa mutwaano. 
- 
Wamana ubabuzye mbuli ciiyo eeco mbocinga cabagwasya mumaumi aabo. 
- 
Ambila sicikolo omwe aunke kumbele kuti aane kaano kamasimpe. 
- 
Ambila basicikolo kuti bakkale mutubunga akukanana ciiyo antela zyiiyo zyili 
mukaano kapegwa asicikolo. 
- 
Akamwi kabunga kazubulule bwiinguzi bwako kwiinda mumwiiminizi wabo. 
- 
Amwaambaule antoomwe abasicikolo kutegwa mujane muzeezo omwe. 
Bulangizi Bweelede: Zyiiyo zyijanwa mutwaano zyalangwa-langwa buluzi. 
 
KUBALA 
Mutwe 1: Mabala 
Mutwe Musyoonto: Mabala Ncaamba 
• Ntalisyo: Muciiyo eeci, basicikolo beelede kupandulula mabala anomoonwa 
akwaabelesya mutwaambo twabo tuluzi. Aaya mabala alabagwasyilizya 
mukumvwisisisya cibalo ncobatiipegwe. 
• Ceelede kucitwa: Kubelesya mulaka weelede mu Foomu 1.  
Cakucita 1: Kubandika mabala anomoonwa ncaamba. 
Mwiiyi: 
- 
Bandika muzeezo wacibalo nokuba kubuzya mibuzyo yakukanana, 
iikwelelezya kumuzeezo wacibalo kutegwa basicikolo baujate muzeezo 
wacibalo akuti batasweeki batalika kubala cibalo eeco. 
- 
Ambila basicikolo kuti babale cibalo cakupozya omwe-omwe aciindi comwe-
comwe. 
- 
Ambila basicikolo kunomoona mabala abakatazya ngubatamvwa ncaamba. 
- 
Ambila basicikolo kuti omwe-omwe baunke kumbele kubboodi baalembe 
mabala ngobanomoona. 
- 
Ambila basicikolo kuti bakkale mutubunga akubandika bupanduluzi 
bwamabala anomoonwa. 
- 
Sindinganya kubupanduluzi bwabasicikolo mbubapa. 
Bulangizi Bweelede: Bupanduluzi bwamabala anomoonwa bwabandikwa buyandika.

26 
 
Cakucita 2: Kuzubulula bupanduluzi bwamabala. 
Mwiiyi: 
- 
Bikka bana mutubunga akubapa mabala ngobati zubulule. 
Bulangizi Bweelede: Mabala anomoonwa azubululwa ncaamba buluzi. 
Cakucita 3: Kubelesya mabala anomoonwa mutwaambo. 
Mwiiyi: 
- 
Ambila basicikolo kuti aumwi abelesye mabala anomoonwa ajanika mucibalo 
mutwaambo twakwe. 
Bulangizi Bweelede: Mabala anomoonwa abelesyegwa buluzi mutwaambo. 
 
Mutwe 2: Kusindinganya Kubala 
Mutwe Musyoonto: Kumvwisisisya Kubala 
• Ntalisyo: Eeci cibeela cilanganya kumvwisisisya kubala. Basicikolo balabala 
zyibalo akuzyimvwisisisya, balavwiila mibuzyo yaandeene akufwiinsya 
zyibalo zyitiibalwe. 
• Ceelede kucitwa: Bala zyibalo zyeelela mu Foomu 1 akuzyimvwisisisya. 
Cakucita 1: Kubala zyibalo 
Mwiiyi: 
- 
Ambila basicikolo kaambo antela kaano kajatikizya cibalo ncobayanda 
kubala. 
- 
Bape mbaakani yakubala cibalo. 
- 
Baambile ntalisyo yacibalo atumwi buyo twaambo tuyandika. 
- 
Ciindi cakubala, bazuminzye basicikolo kuti balibalile cibalo naa 
baswiilizye kuli umwi sikupozya kubala. 
- 
Imika kubala cibalo mumasena mumwi muli twaambo tupati-pati akubabuzya 
mibuzyo naa kusalazya twaambo. Bakulwaizye kwaambaula twaambo otu. 
- 
Babuzye mibuzyo ubone naa balacimvwa ncobabala. 
- 
Aambile bafwiinsye cibalo kwiinda mukwaamba twaambo tupati-pati tuzwa 
mucibalo. 
- 
Babuzye mibuzyo iiyanda bwiinguzi bufwaafwi ayiilya iyanda bwiinguzi 
bulamfwu bwakuyeeyesya. 
- 
Bagwasyilizye kuswaanganya cibalo ncobabala azyicitika mumaumi aabo naa 
zyicitika munyika. 
- 
Bape cakucita kumamanino aaciiyo.

27 
 
Buuza Bulanenga 
Halyoonda wakali mulombwana wakajisi mpuwo mumunzi mwa Chinene. Mpuwo yakwe 
yakaimvwi amakani akuti wakali muvwimi wabanyama bapati abasyoonto, bayoosya 
abatayoosyi. Wakali mulombwana mulamfwu, uuzyandamene alimwi kajisi camba 
cikwazamene. Wakali kusiya mbi mbuli mudima wamainza kajisi maamba mbuli kuti ngu 
ciwena. Wakakwete mukaintu wakeebelwa nzoka mubwina. Bantu bamumunzi ooyu 
bakalikumuvwiya kuti mukaintu wakwe wakali kumutuna. Mukubula coolwe, aaba bantu 
tibakajisi mwana wakulizyalila. Bamwi bakali kwaamba kuti Halyoonda nguwakali apenzi 
lyakutazyala.  
Bumwi buzuba, Halyoonda wakaunka kukuvwima ababwa bakwe ba Nkuba a Nduba. Aaba 
babwa bakali kumuyanda simalelo wabo cakumaninina. Bakali kubeleka canguzu ciindi 
coonse 
akutobela 
malailile. 
Bakalicizyi 
kuvwima 
nkaambo 
kunyina 
buzuba 
mbobakazuminzya simalelo wabo kuti apiluke cinkwamaanza kuŋanda. Buzuba oobu, 
mizimo ya Halyoonda yakamuyunga kuti akavwimine munsi-munsi aamulonga Maunda. 
Ooyu mulonga wakali mupati alimwi tiiwakali kuyuminina nokuba kuti mvwula tiiyawa 
myaka yosanwe. Tiilyakatanta, Halyoonda wakajaya mbaambi. Wakaikulika, yatuba iiya 
kwakwe. Wakeenda buyo kasinzo kafwaafwi naakajana mulombwana uuliciside kapati 
mpoona kanetukide. Kumbali lyakwe kwakalede syuumbwa walo wakalibonya kuti 
wakalifwide nkaambo mulomo wakwe wakali bukwazi, kauzwide bulowa alimwi anziniini 
kazyimuungilila. Wakayeeya kuti amugwasye mulombwana ooyu nkaambo wakazyiba kuti 
muvwiminyina.  
Halyoonda wakasisa mbaambi mucoonde kutegwa anyamune sikuvwima wakaliciside. 
Katanamunyamuna, wakamutyankila matuvwu aamusamu kutegwa zyilonda zyitamujayi. 
Wakamunyamuna akumutola kwakwe. Naakasika amunzi, bakaintu bakatilimuka kubona 
muntu 
wakaliciside 
muciimo 
eeci. 
Halyoonda 
wakamulwiida 
mwinakwe 
mbuli 
mbwaakeenda musyokwe buzuba oobu. Sikulicisa ooyu, bakamutola muŋanda mpati 
akumubikka muzyuli lyakabambene azyuli lyabalaamunzi. Muka Halyoonda wakamusanzya 
muvwimi ooyu akumunanika misamu iindene-indene kutegwa zyilonda zyipone. 
Naakapempenuka, bakamukopela keele kabatanamupa nsima.  
Mubuzuba bwasanu bwakusika amunzi aawa, mweenzu ooyu wakacikonzya kwaambaula 
akoolola maulu anze. Wakabaambila balaamunzi kuti zyina lyakwe wakali Kalapula wakali 
kuzwa mumunzi mwa Chilindi. Ooyu munzi wakali kweendwa mazuba otatwe kuzwa 
kumunzi wa Chinene. Halyoonda amwinakwe bakakkomana kapati kubona kuti mulwazi 
wabo wakali munzila yakupona. Ciindi coonse eeci, Halyoonda wakali buyo amunzi 
kugwasyilizya bakaintu bakwe kulanganya Kalapula. Milimo yakuvwima wakaliiyaamikide. 
Kalapula wakaambilwa kuti akkale mwezi oonse kutegwa apone bweelede. Wakabalumba 
balaamunzi akuzumina ncobakaamba. Mazuba masyoonto buyo aakatobela Halyoonda 
wakazumanana amulimo wakwe wakuvwima.   
Tiilyakatanta, Kalapula wakatalika kulombozya muka Halyoonda. Wakajisi cilengwa cakuti 
kufwumbwa ulaamunzi aunka kukuvwima, walo munsi nkwaambauzya mukaintu wakwe.

28 
 
Kumatalikilo, muka Halyoonda wakali kukaka cakunyema, pele bapati mbobakati ‘Cuulu 
cibomba kudinkila’, makani akatalika kuuba-uba. Muka Halyoonda wakatalika kuba amaano 
abumpelenge. Kalapula amuka Halyoonda bakali kubamba ŋanda kufwumbwa ulaamunzi 
aunka kukuvwima.   
Bumwi buzuba, Nkuba wakaciswa, aboobo wakacaala amunzi ciindi simalelo wakwe a 
Nduba nobakaunka kuvwima musyokwe. Mbuli cilengwa, Kalapula amuka Halyoonda 
bakaliiba mbuli nziniini mumabisi. Aaba basicimambi bakali kuliiba nkaambo ulaamunzi 
wakali kumuka kujoka kukuvwima. Bunji bwazyiindi, wakalikusika aŋanda zuba nolyalomba 
moombe. Nobacita nzyobacita, Nkuba wakali kweebelezya. Cakamucisa kapati mumoyo 
naakabona kutalilemeka kwabantu aaba.  
Buzuba bwakatobela, Nkuba wakaambila simalelo wakwe kuti afwambaane kusika aŋanda 
nkaambo kuli ncaakali kuyanda kuti alibonene. Naakabuzyisisya Halyoonda, wakaambilwa 
kuti bantu mbaakali kusiya amunzi tiibakali kulilemeka munzila iyandika. Wakaunka 
musyokwe akujoka amunzi nokwakainda mawoola obilo. Naakasika amunzi wakajana kuti 
Kalapula amukaintu wakwe bakali muŋanda kabaambaula cakukkomana. Naakanjila 
muŋanda, 
lyakamuleka. 
Wakajana 
Kalapula 
amukaintu 
wakwe 
bali 
kuzyuli 
lyabanabukwetene. Eeci ciindi Kalapula wakalikusama zyisani kakuli muka Halyoonda 
wakacililede abulo. Naakamubona ulaamunzi, Kalapula wakainda abwaanda calubilo, 
ngooyo waalimba masaka. Mukaintu wakacaala wabula acakwaamba. Nguzu zyakamumana 
Halyoonda. Wakayeeya kaambyo kakuti ‘Buuza bulanenga’.  
Bulangizi Bweelede: Zyibalo zyamu Foomu 1 zyabalwa buyandika. 
Cakucita 2: Kwiingula mibuzyo yandeene-andeene. 
Mwiiyi:  
- 
Ambila basicikolo kwiingula mibuzyo iitobela: 
Mibuzyo  
1. 
Ino Kalapula wakali kuzwa mumunzi nzi? 
2. 
Ninzila nzi nzyaakabelesya Halyoonda kunununa buumi bwa Kalapula? 
3. 
Mukaintu wakeebelwa nzoka mubwina, mukaintu ulibuti? 
4. 
Kwaamba kuti “makani akatalika kuuba-uba”caamba nzi? 
5. 
Pandulula ncocaamba ‘kuliiba mbuli nziniini mumabisi’. 
6. 
Ino kaambyo kakuti ‘Buuza bulanenga’ kalizubulula buti mucaano eeci? 
Bulangizi Bweelede: Mibuzyo yaingulwa buluzi.

29 
 
 
Cakucita 3: Kufwiinsya zyibalo zyabalwa. 
Mwiiyi: 
- 
Ambila basicikolo kuti:  
i. 
Baambe bubotu bwakufwiinsya zyibalo.  
ii. 
Baambaule nzila zyakufwiinsya cibalo nzyobazyi. 
iii. 
Kufwiinsya kujisi buyo twaambo tupati-pati tujisi muzeezo wacibalo. 
iv. 
Twaambo twanomoonwa kuzwa mucibalo tatweelede kucinca muzeezo 
kweendelanya amubuzyo. 
v. 
Cibalo cafwiinsyigwa cilembwa mukampango komwe buyo. 
Ntaamu Zyitobelwa 
i. 
Nkubala cibalo ciindi cakusaanguna kutegwa uulemba aciteelele. 
ii. 
Kubala ciindi cabili kutegwa ujane twaambo tupati-pati tuyandika. 
iii. 
Kubikka twaambo mumatobelanwa ayelede. 
iv. 
Kubala mweelwe wamabala kutegwa naa waindilila twaambo tuteelede tuzwe. 
Zyilangilwa kuli sicikolo  
i. 
Kucizyiba kubala akulemba. 
ii. 
Kumvwisisisya ncabala antela cabalwa. 
iii. 
Kuzyiba zyibeela zyijisi twaambo ntwayanda mucibalo. 
iv. 
Kucizyiba kunomoona twaambo akutulemba apepa limbi. 
v. 
Kucizyiba kuti mikozyanyo yapegwa mucibalo tayeelede kubamba kaambo. 
vi. 
Kucizyiba kututobelanya twaambo kubelesya manambala, tweengo antela 
tudombwi. 
Bulangizi Bweelede: Zyibalo zyabalwa zyafwiinsyigwa buluzi. 
Cakucita 4: Kwaamba cibalo cabalwa mumabala abo. 
Mwiiyi:  
- 
Ambila basicikolo kufwiinsya cibalo cabalwa mumabala abo. 
Bulangizi Bweelede: Cibalo cabalwa cafwiinsigwa mumabala abo buyandika. 
Cakucita 5: Kubandika Mabala Ncaamba 
Mwiiyi:  
- 
Lemba mabala mapati-pati aazwa mucibalo. 
- 
Ambila basicikolo kuti bayungizye mabala ngobatazyi ngibajana nibali kubala.  
- 
Ambila kuti, mutubunga naa kkilasi yoonse babandike akwaamba mabala azwa 
mucibalo ncaamba.

30 
 
Bulangizi Bweelede: Mabala ncaamba abandikwa buyandika. 
Mutwe 3: Kubala Kwakuyandilila  
Mutwe Musyoonto: Kubala  
• Ntalisyo:  
Basicikolo beelede kupegwa ciindi cakubala zyibalo zyaandeene-andeene kutegwa 
balikkomanisye akuyungizya luzyibo lwamulaka. Atalaa kooku, bakonzya kusumpula 
mizeezo yabo yakuyandisya kubala. Mukucita boobu, balakonzya kucizyiba kubala 
nkobayanda kumvwa caano ncobabala mbociyaa kunyona-nyona. Muzeezo wakubala 
ooku ngwakuti babone kwiindana kwamulaka kutegwa basumpuke mukubelesya 
mulaka. 
• Ceelede Kucitwa: Kubala zyibalo zyaandeene-andeene zyamu Foomu 1. 
Cakucita 1: Kubala zyibalo zyaandeene-andeene 
Mwiiyi: 
- 
Ambila basicikolo baambe bubotu bwakulibalila zyibalo zyaandeene-andeene. 
- 
Kobakulwaizya basicikolo kubala zyibalo zyaandeene-andeene. 
- 
Bape ciindi cakulibalila aumwi cibalo ncayanda. 
- 
Ambila basicikolo kuti aumwi aambe ncaabala. 
Cakucita 2: Kufwiinsya zyibalo zyabalwa mukukanana. 
Mwiiyi:  
- Ambila basicikolo kuti aumwi aambe ncaabala mubufwaafwi. 
Bulangizi Bweelede: Zyibalo zyabalwa zyafwiinsyigwa buluzi mukukanana. 
 
KULEMBA 
Mutwe: Kufwiinsya 
Mutwe Musyoonto: Kufwiinsya zyibalo mukampango komwe 
• Ntalisyo: Ciiyo eeci cilanganya kufwiinsya cibalo kwiinda mukunomoona twaambo tupati-
pati akutulemba mukampango komwe. Akaambo kaako, twaambo tutajatikizyi muzeezo 
mupati wacibalo cabalwa tulasiigwa. Eeci ciiyo cakunomoona twaambo cigwasya kucizyiba 
kubweza twaambo tupati-pati tujisi muzeezo wacibalo. Luzyibo olu lulagwasya kulemba 
nokuba kwaamba twaambo tunji mubufwaafwi. 
• Ceelede kucitwa: Kufwiinsya zyibalo zyifwaafwi 
 
Cakucita 1: Kubandika bube bwacibalo cafwiinsyigwa. 
Mwiiyi: 
- 
Ambila basicikolo kubala cibalo kucimvwisisisya.            
- 
Tondezya basicikolo mbokunomoonwa twaambo akutulemba apepa muzyiga.

31 
 
- 
Baambile kuti mikozyanyo yapegwa mucibalo taibelesyegwi kuti twaambo 
tupati-pati. 
- 
Bayiisye kuti beelede kubelesya mabala aabo alimwi kaali mauba-uba 
kumvwa. 
- 
Twaambo tupatipati twalembwa tweelede kutobelana kabotu-kabotu. 
- 
Yeezya basicikolo kuti nokuba kuti cibalo bacilemba mubufwaafwi, cileelede 
kuti kacijisi muzeezo mupati wacibalo mukuzulila.  
- 
Bacenjezye basicikolo kuti tabeelede kulemba twaambo twabo ntobayeeyela.  
Bulangizi Bweelede: Zyijanwa abube bwacibalo cafwiinsyiigwa zyabandikwa buyandika. 
Cakucita 2: Kujana twaambo tupati-pati kuzwa mucibalo.  
Mwiiyi: 
- 
Ambila basicikolo kuti beelede kubala cibalo capegwa cimvwugwa 
akuyandaula muzeezo mupati wacibalo. 
- 
Ambila basicikolo kuti beelede kujana twaambo tupati-pati tugwasyilizya 
muzeezo mupati.  
- 
Baambile kuti beelede kupakamana kuti babona kaambo kaindulukwa naa 
twaambo twiindulukwa.  
- 
Cenjezya basicikolo kuti beelede kulibuzya mibuzyo mbuli: 
Sena sikulemba cibalo eeci wakali kusola kwaamba nzi? 
Twaambo nzi tupatipati? 
Twaambo nzi tuyungizya kumuzeezo mupati wacibalo? 
- 
Ambila basicikolo kuti mikozyanyo bunji bwazyiindi tayili akati katwaambo 
tupati-pati. 
Bulangizi Bweelede: Twaambo tupati-pati twacibalo twajanwa bweelede. 
 Cakucita 3: Kufwiinsya cibalo kwiinda mukucilemba mukampango komwe. 
Mwiiyi:  
- 
Ambila basicikolo kuti beelede kubala cibalo cakumvwisisisya. 
- 
Ambila basicikolo kuti bayandaule twaambo tupati-pati tuzwa mucibalo. 
- 
Ambila basicikolo batulembe twaambo ntubajana mumabala abo. 
- 
Ambilabasicikolo kuti twaambo tupatipati ootu tweelede kulembwa 
mukampango komwe buyo. 
- 
Ambila basicikolo kuti batausowi muzeezo mupati wacibalo.  
- 
Ambila basicikolo kuti bamana kulemba kampango beelede kukabala alimwi 
kutegwa kubona kuti kwiina mpokanyongene.  
Bulangizi Bweelede: Cibalo capegwa cafwiinsyigwa buyandika.

32 
 
MULAKA 
Mutwe 1: Maiminizi amazyina 
Mutwe Musyoonto: Misyobo yamaiminizi amazyina 
• Ntalisyo 
Mucibeela eeci tulalanganya misyobo yamaiminizi amazyina alimwi atwaambyo. Mazyina 
buyo ali mumisyobo yaandeene-andeene; kuli aiminina mazyina acigaminina, aatondezya 
cintu nkocizulilwa, aatondeka, aabuzya, aamwi buyo. Basicikolo balacikonzya kubelesya 
misyobo yamazyina aambwa atwaambyo bweelede. 
Ceelede kucitwa: Belesya Maiminizi aamazyina. 
Cakucita 1: Kubandika ncaamba ancaabeleka maiminizi amazyina.  
Mwiiyi: 
- 
Pandulwida basicikolo kuti maiminizi amazyina aiminina mazyina. 
- 
Milimo yamayiminizi aamazyina njeeyi: 
i. 
Kwiiminina mazyina acigaminina 
Mukozyanyo: Cheelo mulamfwu. Ulicizyi kuuma bbola lyamaulu. 
ii. 
Kutondezya cintu nkocizulilwa 
Mukozyanyo: Eeyi ŋombe njiyangu 
iii. 
Kubuzya mibuzyo 
Nguni useka? 
iv. 
Kutondeka zyintu 
Ooyu musune nguwangu. 
v. 
Kuswaanganya zyibeela zyakaambo 
Mukozyanyo: Musankwa wakalima kapati mwaka wakamana 
mweenzuma.  
- 
Ambila basicikolo kuti mu Chitonga, zyimwi zyiindi maiminizi aamazyina 
ntukumbatizyo tujanika mumabala amwi.  
Bulangizi Bweelede: Ncaamba ancaabeleka maiminizi aamazyina cabandikwa buyandika. 
Cakucita 2: Kujana misyobo ya maiminizi aamazyina. 
Mwiiyi:  
- 
Pandulwida basicikolo kuti maiminizi aamazyina ali mumisyobo yaandeene-
andeene 
- 
Ambila basicikolo misyobo ya maiminizi amazyina, mbuli: 
i. 
Aatondeka 
ii. 
Aayiminina zyina 
iii. 
Aatondezya cintu nkocizulilwa. 
Bulangizi Bweelede: Misyobo yamaiminizi aamazyina yandeene-andeene yajanwa buluzi.

33 
 
Cakucita 3: Kubelesya misyobo yamaiminizi aamazyina yaandeene-andeene 
mutwaambo. 
Mwiiyi:  
- 
Bamba kaambo komwe kubelesya musyobo wamaiminizi aamazyina omwe 
kutegwa basicikolo bazyibe cakucita. 
- 
Baambile basicikolo babambe twaambo tumvwugwa kubelesya misyobo 
yaandeene- andeene yamaiminizi aamazyina.  
Bulangizi Bweelede: Twaambo twabambwa buluzi kubelesya misyobo yamaiminizi 
aamazyina yaandeene-andeene. 
Mutwe 2: Maambilambali 
Mutwe Musyoonto 1: Twaambyo 
• Ntalisyo: 
Twaambyo ntwaambo twabusongo tufwaafwi tujisi bupanduluzi busisidwe. Tulijisi mabala 
ajisi lulayo lwazyintu zyamasimpe, zyiiyo antela zyilengwa zyabuponi. Muciiyo omu, 
tulanganya kubandika ncotwaamba ambotubelesyegwa twaambyo, kwaapaula twaambyo 
kweendelanya ancotubelesyegwa, kujana twaambyo tweelede muzyiindi zyeelede akujana 
zyiindi zyeelede twaambyo tweelede.  
• Ceelede Kucitwa: Belesya twaambyo. 
Cakucita 1: Kubandika ncotwaamba ambotubelesyegwa twaambyo.   
Mwiiyi: 
- 
Lemba kaambyo komwe abboodi akubuzya basicikolo ncokaamba 
- 
Buzya basicikolo mbokabelesyegwa kaambyo aako. 
- 
Lemba tumbi twaambyo tuli kkumi kutegwa bapandulule basicikolo. 
- 
Kobandika abasicikolo ncotwaamba twaambyo ambotubelesyegwa. 
Bulangizi Bweelede: Ncotwaamba ambotubelesyegwa twaambyo zyabandikwa buyandika.  
Cakucita 2: Kwaapaula twaambyo kweendelanya ancotubelesyegwa. 
Mwiiyi:  
- 
Yiisya basicikolo kuti kuli twaambyo tulaya, tusensemuna, tubeteka, tupa 
busongo, atumwi buyo.  
- 
 Kobapa twaambyo basicikolo ntobeelede kwaapaula kweendelanya 
ancotubelesyegwa. 
- 
Sololela basicikolo mukwaapaula twaambyo kweendelanya 
ancotubelesyegwa.  
Bulangizi Bweelede: Twaambyo twaapaulwa buluzi kweendelanya ancotubelesyegwa.

34 
 
Cakucita 3: Kujana twaambyo tweelede kubelesyegwa muzyiindi zyeelede. 
Mwiiyi:  
- 
Tondezya basicikolo mukozyanyo oyu:  Mweenzyinyoko ukkala buyo amunzi 
kakutakwe ncacita mpoona kali mucete kapati. Ino nkaambyo nzi 
nkomukonzya kubelesya kumweenzyinyoko oyu? 
Bwiinguzi: ‘Cibuye tapi.’ 
- 
Amwaambaule abasicikolo twaambyo twaandeene-andeene alimwi 
azyiindi notubelesyegwa. 
- 
 Kopa zyiindi zyaandeene-andeene akwaambila basicikolo kuti balembe 
twaambyo tukonzya kubelesyegwa muzyiindi zyapegwa. 
- 
 Ambila basicikolo kuti baambaule, bajane zyiindi zyiindene zyone  
akaambyo keelede kubelesya. 
- 
 Kokulwaizya basicikolo kubelesya twaambyo cabusongo 
mukukanana amukulemba.    
Bulangizi Bweelede: Twaambyo tweelede kubelesyegwa muzyiindi zyeelede 
twajanwa buluzi. 
Cakucita 4: Kujana zyiindi zyeelede motunga twabelesyegwa twaambyo tupedwe 
Mwiiyi: 
- 
Kopa basicikolo zyiindi zyisiyene-siyene.  
- 
Baambile kuti balembe twaambyo tunga twabelesyegwa muzyiindi 
zyapegwa. 
Bulangizi Bweelede: Zyiindi notweelede kubelesyegwa twaambyo tweelede zyajanwa 
buluzi. 
 
KUSANDULULA

Bala mubandi uutobela 
Choolwe: Yawe Maliya, sena ulatutobelezya twaambo twalusumpuko tucitika mumunzi 
wesu? 
Maliya: Inzya musa, kuboneka mbuli kuti kuli twaambo tujatikizya mayake. Ino yebo uyeeya 
buti? 
Choolwe: Mebo ndiyeeya kuti ooyu mukozyanyo mubotu wabweendelezi butali kabotu. 
Beendelezi tababeleki kabotu alimwi balabamba twaambo tutali kabotu. Cintu cipati 
ncobayanda nkubweza mali akutalanganya bube bwabantu bwamucooko mobakkala. 
Maliya: 
 Masimpe, bweendelezi bubotu bujatikizya bubelesi bubotu bujisi bumboni 
bwazyintu zyibelekwa alimwi akusanganya bantu mububelesi. Ncintu ciyandisi kuti bantu 
kabasanganizyigwa mubweendelezi mukubamba twaambo alimwi beendelezi beelede 
kupandulwida bantu kuzyintu zyobataciti kabotu. 
Choolwe: Mbombubo! Alimwi takuli buyo kubambila bantu twaambo tupati, pele basololi 
balijisi mulimo wakulanganya bantu muzyibeela zyinji, mbuli; kulanganya nseba zyabantu, 
lwiiyo alimwi abulondo bwabantu. Aboobo kuti buleli kabuli bubi, cilakonzya kuleta ntenda 
mpati kubantu bapengede mucooko. 
Maliya:  Masimpe, buleli butali kabotu bupa kuti kube makulo, kusalaulana alimwi 
amanyongwe. Kulubazu lumwi, bweendelezi bubotu bulakonzya kusumpula buvwubi 
bwacisi, kweelana kwabantu alimwi akuba amasena mabotu. 
Choolwe: Maliya, ino uyeeya kuti twaambo nzi tupati tujatikizya bulelo bubotu? 
Maliya:  Ndiyeeya kuti twaambo tupati tujatikizya bweendelezi bubotu ntootu; kubeleka 
munzila iilibonya caantangalala alimwi akusanganya bantu mukubamba twaambo 
twabweendelezi bwacisi. Kunze akooko, bweendelezi bubotu bulalanganya atwaambo 
twamulawo. Alimwi cilayandika kuba atubunga tulyeendelezya mbuli, twabasimubweza 
twaambo alimwi atwababetesi balyeendelezya. 
Choolwe: Cabota, ootu twaambo ntupati, ndilakonzya kuyungizya kwaamba kuti buleli 
bubotu bweelede kubamba mbaakani zyitola ciindi, kwiinda mukulanganya buyo twaambo 
twacibukilambuta. Mukuyungizya, buleli bubotu bweelede kubamba twaambo tukonzya 
kuleta bubotu kumisela iiboola kuleka buyo kulanganya misela yaino.

38 
 
Maliya: Masimpe, buleli bubotu bujisi kubeleka kuyandilila, kulyaaba, kutaba

mukubamba twaambo twacisi. Kwiinda mukubelekela antoomwe, tulakonzya kubamba 
zyooko zyesu kuti zyeendelezyegwe kabotu. 
Bulangazi Bweelede: Twaambo tuyandika twalembwa cakutobelanya.

                                                        BULELO 
Bulelo ncintu ciyandisi mubukkale bwesu. Bulelo bubotu bulakonzya kuleta lusumpuko 
kakuli bulelo bubi bulakonzya kuleta mapyopyongano mucisi. Kulombozya kwamuntu oonse 
mucisi cesu ca Zambia nokuba muzyooko zyimbi zyanyika nkwakuti baleli kabakonzya 
kulela kabotu bantu babo. Kutegwa bulelo butegwe mbubotu, basololi bajanika mubulelo obu 
beelede kuba bantu bajisi zyiimo eezyi; 
- 
Bateelela bantu babo ncobaamba akubagwasya kuli zyeezyo nzobabula 
mumaumi aabo. 
- 
Bantu kabazumina kubuleli bwabo kutali kusinikizyigwa buya.  
- 
Muntu uujisi micito yeendelana atwaambo twakwe. Musololi uleelede 
kuba muntu uuzwidilizya zyisyomyo zyakwe kakunyina kudonaika. 
Mulikaako, musololi uleelede kuba citondezyo bantu ncobeelede kutobela. 
- 
Muntu ulaakati-kati mubusololi bwakwe. Nkokuti muntu utali muyumu 
moyo nokuba muteteete. Mizeezo yakwe yeelede kuba yaakati-kati. 
- 
Kabatali basyacimvulemwaangu. Musololi mubotu tayelede kuba muntu 
uyandisya kudyaaminina bamwi kutegwa abweze buvwubi bwabo. 
Mu Zambia, tulijisi coolwe nkaambo baleli boonse kuzwa kuli bakusaanguna kusika 
mbotujisi ino, mbantu bayanda cisi akuteelela lulayo luzwa kubantu. Cintu cizubulula bube 
bwabasololi aaba ninzila mbobasetuka kuzwa azyuuno. Basololi bakusaanguna ba Kenneth 
Kaunda bakazundwa kukusalwa kwakali mumwaka wa 1991 alimwi kwakanyina buyumu-
yumu ciindi cakuzwa acuuno nocakasika. 
Basololi babili bakali ba Fredrick Chiluba balo bakalela cisi ca Zambia kuzwa mumwaka wa 
1991 kusikila mumwaka wa 2001 mwalo mobakasetuka acuuno akusiila ba Patrick Levy 
Mwanawasa. Ba Levy Mwanawasa bakalela kuzwa mumwaka wa 2001 kusikila mumwaka 
wa 2008 nobakazaya. Bulelo bwa ba Mwanawasa bwakali bulelo bwakalwana ciyanza 
camakulo aboobo bantu bana Zambia bakabikka lusyomo akuba abulangizi bwakuba acisi 
cijisi milimo mibotu. Mubulelo oobu, bana Zambia kaba acoolwe cakumana cikwelete cisi ca 
Zambia ncocakajisi kuzwa kubbanga lyanyika ambunga zyimwi zyikweletesya mali kumasi. 
Milimo yabuleli bwa ba Mwanawasa izubulula mbuli bulelo bubotu mbobubede.  
Mumwaka wa 2008, cisi ca Zambia cakasikilwa mapenzi. Baleli bacisi bakatusiya aboobo 
kwakaba kusala kwacibukilambuta kwakapa kuti ba Rupiah Banda babweze busololi bwacisi. 
Ba Banda bakalela kuzwa mumwaka ooyu kusikila mumwaka wa 2011 mwalo cisi nocakaba 
akusala kumbi. Mumwaka ooyu mbunga ya MMD yakazundwa ambunga ya PF, yalo yakaba 
njiilela. Nkamu eeyi yakali kweendelezyegwa aba Michael Sata.  Ba Michael Sata bakazaya 
kabali acuuno aboobo baleli Ba Lungu mbikasalwa nikwakaba kusala kwacibukilambuta. Ba 
Lungu bakalela cisi eeci kusikila mumwaka wa 2021 nobakazundwa kuli ba Hakainde 
Hichilema bankamu ya UPND. Abwalo bulelo bwa ba Hichilema bwaleta lusumpuko lunji 
lwalo lwagwasya kapati kusumpula maumi abantu mucisi ca Zambia. Bulelo obu bwaleta 
lwiiyo lwasamba tulye, kubbadela zyikwelete zyacisi, kunjila zyuulu-zyuulu zyabamayi 
abasilisi milimo kakunyina kubelesya makulo, kuvwozya mali bamacembele abamatumbu.

41 
 
Kunze akooko, abantu bakakakilwa kutebula nkaambo aaciyumayuma abalo bakatalika 
kuvwola mali. Kuli lusumpuko lunji mbuli kupegwa mali kubakubusyi abamakaintu kutegwa 
babukulusye makwebo aabo alimwi abalo balimi balapegwa camutunzya ambuto yakuti 
basumpule bulimi bwabo. Amube muzyikolo basicikolo banji balabbadelelwa 
amfwulumende alimwi mbeena basicikolo balapegwa zilyo zyibotu zyijisi busani kumibili 
yabo. Bulelo bwaba UPND mukozyanyo mubotu ujatikizya bulelo bubotu. 
Kutegwa bulelo butegwe mbubotu buleelede kutobela nzila naa mulawo mbowaamba. 
Kuyandisya kwamuntu oonse amuciinga coonse ca Zambia, nkuba abulelo butasalauli naa 
bunyina basololi basyacivwulemwangu. Naa bulelo oobu bwabikkwa, nkokuti lusumpuko 
alwalo inga lwatalika kulibonya alimwi zyiyanza zyamakulo inga zyaceya.

Bube Bwacaano Cijatikizya Buumi Bwako  
Caano eeci cilalembwa kwiinda mukubelesya muntu mutaanzi mbuli: Ime, mebo antela 
ndime mucibaaka cakwaamba mulembi uulemba caano eeco.  
 Mulembi ulaamba kuyeeya kwakwe, mbwalimvwa amizeezo ijatikizya buumi 
bwakwe. 
 Mulembi weelede kutondezya buumi bwakwe mbwapona, kubandauka 
azyiindi, mbwakkala abantu azyiyanza zyabuponi bwakwe. 
 Mulembi weelede kulilingula akutondezya mbaakani ikwelelezya mubuumi 
bwakwe, alimwi weelede kulemba azyeezyo zyitakwelelezyi. 
Zyilanganyizyigwa mukulemba: 
- 
Maccililanwa azyintu mbuzyakali kuyaabucitika. 
Mulembi weelede kutondezya maccililanwa azyintu nzyayanda kwaamba 
kwiinda mukulemba bweende bwabuumi bwakwe mbuli mbuzyakali 
kuyaabutobelana kucitika. Eeci cilanganya kuzwa kumatalikilo aabuumi 
bwakwe, mukwasyi wakwe, buumi mbwapona, balongwe bakwe, lwiiyo 
lwakwe, kuzwidilila amakatazyo ngaakajana mukati kabuponi bwakwe.  
 
Bwakulemba caano cabuumi bwako omwini. 
1. Talika kulizubulula mubufwaafwi amuzeezo wancoyanda kulemba. 
2. Belesya twaambo twabuumi bwako tuli masimpe kwiinda mukubelesya 
mabala apandulula cabusongo kubotezya caano cako. 
3. Bona kuti twaambo twamvwigwa akutobelana kabotu-kabotu. 
Bulangizi Bweelede: Bube azyilanganyizyigwa mukulemba buumi bwako zyabandikwa 
buyandika. 
 
Cakucita 2:  Kuzubulula caano cabuumi bwako mukukanana 
Mwiiyi:  
i. 
Ambila basicikolo caano mubufwaafwi cijatikizya buumi bwako. 
ii. 
Wamana ubaambile mubufwaafwi kuti abalo balakonzya kwaamba caano 
cijatikizya buumi bwabo kwiinda mukulanga-langa twaambo tupati- pati 
mubuumi bwabo. 
iii. 
Ambila basicikolo bazubulule zyaano zyabuumi bwabo mukubandika 
mutubunga. 
iv. 
Ulakonzya kusala omwe akabunga akamwi kutegwa mwamana abasicikolo 
mubandike zyiiyo akubakulwaizya kuba ambaakani mubuumi. 
Bulangizi Bweelede: Caano cabuumi bwakwe cazubululwa mukwaambaula buyandika.

45 
 
Cakucita 3: Kulemba caano aumwi cipandulula buumi bwakwe. 
Mwiiyi: 
1. Ambila basicikolo kuti balembe aumwi caano cabuumi bwakwe. 
Bulangizi Bweelede: Caano cipandulula aumwi buumi bwakwe calembwa buluzi. 
 
MULAKA 
Mutwe 1: Maamba maciti 
Mutwe Musyoonto: Misyobo ya Maamba Maciti 
 Ntalisyo: Cibeela eeci cilalanganya misyobo ya mamba maciti. Kwamana 
cilalanganya kupandulula mamba maciti amulimo wangawo. Kulaba kutondezya 
misyobo yamaamba maciti, kwaapaula mumisyobo yangawo akubamba twaambo 
kubelesya maamba maciti. 
Ceelede Kucitwa: Belesya misyobo yamaamba maciti yaandeene-andeene. 
 
Cakucita 1: Kupandulula maamba maciti ncaamba ambwaabelesyegwa. 
Mwiiyi: 
- 
Inga wapa mukozyanyo kwiinda mukwiita sicikolo omwe kumbele 
akumwaambila mukutwi kuti ayende asyoonto – syoonto mucikolo amana 
ayende cakufwambaana.   
- 
Buzya basicikolo ncaacita mweenzyinyina. (Twaambo tulangilwa: 
Walikweenda asyoonto –syoonto, naamana weenda cakufwambaana) 
- 
Ambila basicikolo batondezye mabala apandulula maciti mbwaacitika 
(Mabala alangilwa: asyoonto - syoonto, cakufwambaana) 
- 
Zumanana ciiyo kwiinda mukupandulula maamba maciti ncaamba. 
- 
Lemba mutwe waciiyo abboodi wamana upandulule maamba maciti kuti 
“Aaya mabala apandulula maciti”. Mulimo wamaamba maciti 
ngwakutondezya bupanduluzi oobu:  
i. 
Bwambwaacitika maciti,  
ii. 
Naacitika  
iii. 
Kkwaacitikila   
iv. 
Bunji bwazyiindi naacitika. 
- 
Lemba twaambo tuccilila abboodi bamana basicikolo batondezye maamba 
maciti: 
(a) Mwiimbi wakaimba cinoneezya. 
(b) Tuyakusika cifwumo. 
(c) Bakkala okuno. 
(d) Ndilavwula kubaswaya baneene. 
Bulangizi Bweelede: Ncaamba maamba maciti amulimo mbwaabelesyegwa zyapandululwa 
buluzi.

46 
 
Cakucita 2: Kutondezya misyobo yamaamba maciti (aatondezya ciindi naacitika, 
mbocivwula kucitika, nkocicitikila, bunji bwazyiindi naacitika ambocicitika.) 
Mwiiyi: 
1. Ambila basicikolo misyobo yamaamba maciti kwiinda mukubapanduluda 
mikozyanyo yapegwa atala. 
2. Lemba misyobo yamaamba maciti abboodi akupandulula kabotu – kabotu. 
Bulangizi Bweelede: Misyobo yamaamba maciti yaandeene-andeene yatondezyegwa buluzi. 
Cakucita 3: Kwaapaula maamba maciti mumisyobo yawo. 
Mwiiyi: 
- 
Lemba maamba maciti aavwelengene abboodi wamana ubabikke 
basicikolo mutubunga baapaule kubikka mumisyobo yangawo. 
- 
Mwiiminizi wakabunga akamwi azubulule bwaapauzi bwabo. 
- 
Amubandike muzuminane abasicikolo kutegwa babweze muzeezo omwe 
boonse. 
Bulangizi Bweelede: Maamba maciti aapaulwa buluzi mumisyobo yangawo. 
Cakucita 4: Kubamba twaambo kubelesya maamba maciti aandeene – andeene. 
 
Mwiiyi: 
- 
Amba kaambo kajisi amba citi. Wamana ubuzye basicikolo bajane amba citi 
lyabelesyegwa amusyobo walyo. 
- 
Buzya basicikolo botatwe babambe twaambo kubelesya maamba maciti amusyobo 
wamaamba maciti ngubabelesya. 
- 
Lemba maamba maciti abboodi ngobatiibelesye kulemba mutwaambo twabo. 
Bulangizi Bweelede: Twaambo twabambwa kubelesya misyobo yaandeene yamaamba 
maciti buluzi. 
 
Mutwe 2: Maambilambali 
Mutwe Musyoonto: Tusimyo 
 Ntalisyo: Cibeela eeci cilanganya tusimyo akutubelesya mutwaambo. Cilalanganya 
tusimyo ncotwaamba amulimo wantuto. Kwamana boobo, kulaba kubikka tusimyo 
kweendelanya amulimo wantuto. Kulaba kujana tusimyo twakubelesya muzyiindi 
zyapegwa akujana zyiindi zyiluzi zyakubelesya tusimyo. 
 Ceelede Kucitwa: Belesya tusimyo. 
Cakucita 1: Kubandika tusimyo ncotwaamba ancotubeleka. 
Mwiiyi: 
- 
Lemba kasimyo abboodi akubuzya basicikolo naa balikazyi ncokaamba (Lyalanga 
lyakalya muncile). 
- 
Pandulula ncokaamba ambokabelesyegwa.  
- 
Pandulwida basicikolo kuti tusimyo ntwaambo tufwaafwi, tuvwula kubelesyegwa 
kwaamba bwini buyandilide, naa kukulwaizya mubuumi. Bunji bwazyiindi, tusimyo

47 
 
tatujisi bupanduluzi busindingenyi pele tulakonzya kwaamba masimpe naa 
kuzubulula zyintu zyicitika. 
Bulangizi Bweelede: Ncotwaamba ambotubelesyegwa tusimyo cabandikwa buyandika. 
 
Cakucita 2: Kwaapaula tusimyo kweendelanya ambotubelesyegwa. 
Mwiiyi: 
- 
Ambila basicikolo kuti kuli tusimyo tucenjezya antela tulaya atuyumya- yumya. 
- 
Tondezya mukozyanyo wakasimyo kacenjezya antela kulaya (Taata ulya twe). Aka 
kasimyo kalaya bantu balyato naa baunyu. 
- 
Bikka basicikolo mutubunga balembe tusimyo abamwi tobilo tulaya atobilo tuyumya-
yumya. 
- 
Baiminizi batubunga bazubulule twaambo tubazuminana mwamana mubandike 
abasicikolo boonse kubamba muzeezo omwe. 
Bulangizi Bweelede: Tusimyo twabikkwa kweendelana ambotubelesyegwa. 
 
Cakucita 3: Kutondezya tusimyo tweelede kubelesyegwa muzyiindi zyapegwa. 
Mwiiyi:  
- 
Belesya mikozyanyo yazyintu zyicitika mubuumi zyobabona basicikolo. 
Mukozyanyo: kuti koyiisya kasimyo kakuti “Uno mwaka ndibbenda matako”, 
weelede kwaamba cakacitika cimwi ciindi calo ceendelana akasimyo kaambwa aawa. 
- 
Baambile twaano naa tusobano basicikolo twalo tutondezya bupanduluzi bwatusimyo. 
- 
Baambile tusimyo tobakonzya kubelesya muminzi yabo. 
- 
Ulakonzya kutalika kasimyo mpoona wabalekela basicikolo kuti bakamaninzye 
kukaamba. 
- 
Weelede kukulwaizya basicikolo kuti kababelesya tusimyo mutwaambo amumibandi. 
Bulangizi Bweelede: kasimyo keelede kabelesyegwa buluzi muciindi ceelede  
Cakucita 4: Kutondezya zyiindi notweelede kubelesyegwa tusimyo twapegwa. 
Mwiiyi: 
- 
Pandulwida basicikolo ciindi ceelede kubelesyegwa kasimyo akasimyo keelede. 
- 
Lemba tusimyo wamana waambile basicikolo balembe zyiindi notubelesyegwa. 
Bulangizi Bweelede: Zyiindi zyeelede zyakubelesya tusimyo zyatondezyegwa buluzi.

48 
 
KUSANDULULA 
Mutwe: Kusandulula 
Mutwe Musyoonto: Nzila zyakusandulula. 
 Ntalisyo: Cibeela eeci cilanganya mbokusandululwa cibalo kuzwa mumulaka umwi 
kutola muli uumwi. Ntaamu zyitobelwa mukusandulula zyilapandululwa. 
Ceelede Kucitwa: Belesya nzila zyaandeene-andeene kusandulula cibalo kuzwa mu 
Chikuwa kutola mu Chitonga, akuzwa mu Chitonga kutola mu Chikuwa. 
Cakucita: Kusandulula cibalo kuzwa mu Chikuwa kutola mu Chitonga akuzwisya mu 
Chitonga kutola mu Chikuwa kubelesya nzila zyaandeene-andeene. (Kubweza muzeezo 
wacibalo oonse, kugusya mabala atayandiki, kubelesya mabala ataliko mucibalo pele ayelela 
kubelesya, akuulanganya kapati muzeezo wacibalo kutali bube bwamabala.) 
Mwiiyi: 
- 
Pandulwida basicikolo milawo eeyi:  
i. 
Tabeelede kusandula bbala abbala nobasandulula cibalo 
ii. 
Muzeezo wacibalo taucinci 
iii. 
Twaandaanyo tweenda antoomwe amulaka, aboobo tweelede kubikkwa 
mpotweelede. 
iv. 
Mazyina acigaminina taacincigwi. 
v. 
Taceelede kuleta twaambo tutako mucibalo camulaka uusandululwa. 
vi. 
Ciindi cibelesyedwe mumulaka uusandululwa tacicinci. 
Bulangizi Bweelede Nzila zyaandeene-andeene zyakusandulula cibalo kuzwa mumulaka 
umwi kutola muli uumwi, akujosya zyabelesyegwa bweelede.

Cakucita 1: Kwiita akwiingula tulabi 
Mwiiyi: 
- 
Ambila basicikolo mbokulabikwa alimwi ambokwiingulwa. 
- 
Ambila basicikolo sikwiingula mbwayelede kwiingula kuti kalabi kamukakila.

- 
Talisya kulanganya bwiinguzi bwakalabi nkoyanda kubamba. 
-

Kaambe mujwi mbokeelede kulimvwisya.

Kumamanino bamba mubuzyo uujisi bwiinguzi busisidwe mubabala amasendelela.

Bulangizi Bweelede: Tulabi tupya twabambwa buyandika. 
 
KUBALA 
Mutwe 2: Mabala 
Mutwe Musyoonto: Mabala Ncaamba  
 Ntalisyo: Muciiyo eeci, basicikolo beelede kupandulula mabala anomoonwa 
akwaabelesya mutwaambo tuluzi. Aaya mabala alabagwasyilizya mukumvwisisisya 
cibalo ncobatiipegwe. 
 Ceelede Kucitwa: Belesya mabala ayelede mu Foomu 1. 
Cakucita 1: Kubandika mabala anomoonwa ncaamba. 
Mwiiyi: 
- 
Lemba mabala azwa mucibalo.  
- 
Pandulula amwi mabala ncaamba. 
- 
Bandika abasicikolo ncaamba mabala apedwe.  
- 
Ambila basicikolo kuti bupanduluzi bwamabala amwi bweelede kupegwa 
kweendelana ambwaabelesyegwa mucibalo. 
 Bulangizi Bweelede: Bupanduluzi bwamabala anomoonwa bwabandikwa buyandika. 
Cakucita 2: Kuzubulula bupanduluzi bwamabala. 
Mwiiyi:  
- 
Bikka basicikolo mutubunga akubapa mabala ngobati pandulule. 
- 
Ambila basicikolo kuti bakanane mutubunga twabo kujatikizya bupanduluzi 
bwamabala. 
- 
Lailila kuti akamwi kabunga kasale mwiiminizi utiimikile akupa bupanduluzi 
bwazuminwa mukabunga kabo. 
- 
Zuminzya tubunga tumwi kuyungizya antela kubambulula bupanduluzi bwapegwa 
akabunga komwe-komwe.  
- 
Yungizya kubupanduluzi bwabasicikolo akulemba abboodi. 
Bulangizi Bweelede: Mabala anomoonwa azubululwa ncaamba buluzi.

52 
 
Cakucita 3: Kubelesya mabala anomoonwa mutwaambo. 
Mwiiyi:  
- 
Kopa basicikolo mabala ngobatiibelesye mutwaambo twabo. 
- 
Ambila basicikolo kulemba twaambo kwiinda mukubelesya mabala anomoonwa. 
- 
Bazyibye kuti tabeelede kubelesya twaambyo tuli mucibalo.  
Bulangizi Bweelede: Mabala anomoonwa abelesyegwa buluzi mutwaambo. 
Mutwe 2: Kusindinganya Kubala 
Mutwe Musyoonto: Kumvwisisisya Kubala 
 Ntalisyo: Cibeela eeci cijatikizya kubala zyibalo akwiingula mibuzyo yaandeene-
andeene iizwa muzyibalo, kufwiisya kubelesya mabala abo akukanana mabala 
ncaamba.  
 Ceelede Kucitwa: Kubala zyibalo zya Foomu 1 zyijisi misyobo yazyaano zyiindene. 
Cakucita 1: Kubala zyibalo 
Mwiiyi: 
- 
Ambila basicikolo kaambo antela kaano kajatikizya cibalo ncobayanda kubala. 
- 
Bape mbaakani zyakubala, mbuli kwiingula mibuzyo akufwiinsya cibalo. 
- 
Baambile ntalisyo lyabbuku mbuli mutwe wacibalo, atumwi buyo twaambo 
tuyandisi. 
- 
Bazuminzye basicikolo kuti balibalile cibalo naa baswiilizye kuli umwi 
sikupozya kubala. 
- 
Imika kubala cibalo mumasena mumwi muli twaambo tupati-pati akubabuzya 
mibuzyo naa kusalazya twaambo, akubakulwaizya kwaambaula zyatwaambo 
ootu. 
- 
Babuzye mibuzyo ubone kuti naa balacimvwa ncibabala. 
- 
Babuzye mibuzyo iiyanda bwiinguzi bufwaafwi aiyanda bwiinguzi bulamfwu 
bwakuyeeyesya. 
- 
Bagwasyilizye kuswaanganya cibalo ncibabala azyicitika mumaumi aabo naa 
zyicitika munyika. 
- 
Ulakonzya kubabuzya mibuzyo muciindi cakwiiya (kutegwa uzyibe 
mpobeendela) naa kubapa cakucita kumamanino aaciiyo. 
Kuyungizya kumaccililanwa alaatala awa, ulakonzya: 
- 
Kutondezya 
basicikolo 
zyifwanikiso 
azyimwi 
buyo 
zyakweebela 
mukubagwasyilizya kuti bamvwe cibalo ncibabala. 
- 
Ulakonzya kubelesya tusobano kutegwa basicikolo bamvwisisisye cibalo.

53 
 
Kubala cibalo 
Maawe taata! Ndilatyani mebo, nkeelele kwani? Nkaambo nzi omwana abana cimbala 
cikwasa kumatako ncoobelesya nzila eeyi, watusiya tolayi hhi! hhi! hhi! maawe baama, 
maawe taata! Ndausa, ndagunwa! 
Cakacitikide kuti bumwi buzuba bina Mululwe bakaunkide kumulonga Ncute kuyakuzela 
nkaambo bwakali buzuba bwabwela kuzyiba lya Kadyoonga. Minzi yoonse yakazingulukide 
muloonga Ncute yakayoboloka niyakateelela moompoompo wabwela.  
Bamalombwana bakaboola amyuumba yabo alimwi azyiliba kakube bamwi bakajisi tusabwi 
tusiyene-siyene. Nkooko tuboole kuli makaintu, bakali tusamide tusinsi twabo kumwi katuyaa 
kubbeeluka. Balo bakajisi masyiko. Masyiko aabo akaliimpene mukulukwa, amwi akalukidwe 
aamatete kakubee amwi akalukidwe aamabu. Pesi masyiko aakali kwiinda kubota akalukidwe 
aasamu.  
Bakanjila muzyiba lya Kadyoongwa ciindi cacilanga bwaaseme. Munene wakataanguna 
kunjila muzyiba wakali Hamundyoli nkaambo ngowakali duundumutule kumukowa 
wabayuni. Cakali cilengwa cabatonga kubona kuti mupati mumukowa nguwakeelede kujula 
mulyango. Aboobo cakeelela kuti Hamundyooli ataangune kwaalyata meenda kutanda ntende 
antela malweza akali kukonzya kucitika. 
Zyakalila nguluulu kuli bamakaintu, nkooko uteelele ntinta nkozyakali kulila pe, cakali 
kunoneezya. Bamalombwana balo bakaluujisi kulibanda atalaa zyiliba zyiyaa kwiimpauka, 
kwiimpana buyo camyuumba. Kuli balaa bunyeele takwiindwi tubili kulanga, nkucenka buyo 
kuyoowa kwalo kuti inga kabaya kuyasana myuumba.  
Aalya eeni mpolibonenwa ngulube ciindi nobazwa mumeenda akumvwoomana mumuseenga, 
kabayanda kutalika mizundano yakutingaana tumando, wakaboola mwana musankwa 
Chikwama kuzwa ku Mapanza ku Muyale lizyaa kumubala alubala lwakwe lwalo ndoolo 
kumweka mbuli kuti wakananide mafwuta amuceka. Kusyibingana kwalo kumeso 
wamulanga, inga wazyiba kuti wakali kayumwide. 
Mpaakuboola bina Mululwe kuzyikumujuzya. Bakasaanguna kumulanga mwida, bamusomba 
cibwantu mukweelezya basengezya musozya wamisyungu wakabikkidwe nyemu, mbwiila 
abuntele walo ngwakazwezya buyo kulya mbuli kuti walikukuna buyo kakunyina 
kutamfwuna, nobayakumwaanzya. Pesi ndilyona bakazyiba kuti tilwakali lweendo lwabuseke. 
Kumamanino Chikwama nkokuya kuti “Tiitoona kabotu, munene watusiya …” Katana 
akumanizya kuluula caano cakwe Chikwama, bina Mululwe bakalijana ansi kabaalabana 
akulilauka ooku.   
(Ooyu mukozyanyo buyo mulakonzya kupa cibalo cimbi) 
Bulangizi Bweelede: Zyibalo zyibeelede zyabalwa bweelede. 
 
Bulangazi Bweelede: Zyibalo zyamu Foomu 1 zyabalwa buyandika.

54 
 
Cakucita 2: Kwiingula mibuzyo iisiyene-siyene. 
Mwiiyi:  
- 
Buzya basicikolo mibuzyo yaatala-tala. 
- 
Ambila basicikolo kupa bupanduluzi bwatwaambo twamaambilambali ncotwaamba. 
- 
Pa basicikolo mibuzyo njobeelede kwiingwila mumabbuku aabo.   
Mibuzyo  
i. 
Kocipa mutwe cibalo. 
ii. 
Nguni wakaleta mulumbe wamause? 
iii. 
Ino bamakaintu bakali kubelesya nzi ciindi nibakali kuzela? 
iv. 
Ncisobano nzi ncobakali kusobana ciindi bamana kuzela? 
v. 
Kunze aanzila zyakuzela zyalembwa mucibalo, lemba azyimwi nzila 
zyibelesyegwa mukuzela. 
Bulangazi Bweelede: Mibuzyo yayingulwa buluzi. 
Cakucita 3: Kufwiisya cibalo cabalwa. 
Mwiiyi: 
- 
Kopa basicikolo cibalo ncobeelede kubala. 
- 
Ambila basicikolo kuti bajane twaambo naa mizeezo mipati-pati ikwabana amuzeezo 
mupati kuzwa mucibalo. 
- 
Ambila basicikolo kuti balembe mubufwaafwi twaambo tupati-pati twajanwa 
mucibalo.   
- 
Ambila basicikolo kuti twaambo twajanwa batululamike akutulemba mumabbuku 
aabo. 
- 
Ambila basicikolo kuti babelesye mabala aswaanganya mbuli mbobalemba twaambo 
twabo. 
Bulangizi Bweelede: Zyibalo zyabalwa zyafwiinsigwa buluzi. 
Cakucita 4: Kukanana cibalo kubelesya mabala ako mubufwaafwi. 
Mwiiyi: 
- 
Ambila basicikolo ntaamu zyibelesyegwa mukufwiinsya cibalo kwiinda 
mukubelesya mabala abo, mbuli zyeezyi zyitobela: 
i. 
Weelede kuciteela cibalo kwiinda mukucibala akucibalulula. 
ii. 
Jana muzeezo wacibalo amabala mapati-pati. 
iii. 
Cilembulule cibalo kubelesya mabala ako kwiinda mukuyeeya ncoolikubala. 
iv. 
Belesya mulaka wako.

                                      AAYA MASYABA-SYABA 
Kwakali mulombe namutekenya watootokala tubweza bantu mudolopo lya Mazabuka. Ooyu 
musankwa zyina lyakwe wakali Mambuli.  Nkabela musankwa ooyu wakalizyizyilwe 
kumakani aakuyandisya basimbi. Kayi kumwi basimbi banji abalo balabayanda kapati 
basankwa beenzya myootokala. Eeci cakapa kuti cimuubaubile Mambuli akaambo kabasimbi 
bali boobu. 
Bumwi buzuba, keenzya mootokala wakwe aciindi cakulubundu-bundu, Mambuli wakabona 
musimbi walo wakamukonda cakuzwa munzila. Naakamwiinda asyoonto wakaimika 
mootokala wakwe mwanaa Beetwa akuzwa mumootokala. Naakasika musimbi mpaakayeeme 
amootokala, Mambuli wakaanzya musimbi ooyu calumwemwe. Musimbi wakaima 
akwiingula kwaanzyigwa. Mpoona musankwa wakalomba kukanana amusimbi ooyu. 
Kakunyina akusowa ciindi musimbi wakazumina. Mwanaa musankwa limwi wakalomba kuti 
bakananine mumootokala buya. Alyalo oyu mooye kunyina naakakaka pe. 
Aaba bantu baakanana mubandi wakusyabana nkabela musimbi wakazumina 
kukwaambauzyigwa ooku. Mambuli mbuli mbwaakali aabusa bwakoona amusimbi ooyu, 
ngoona mangolezya aya wakamoona. 
Nobakamana kulikkomanisya bantu aaba, musimbi wakalomba kuti aunke nkaambo kwakaba 
masiku eeni. Mambuli kukkomana kwalo wakamutola buya kwabo musimbi ooyu. 
Kabaceenda kuya ku kkomponi ya Kabobola, musimbi wakaambila musankwa kuti wafwa 
mpeyo. Mambuli mbwaakasamine kajekete kacikutu kaubauba, wakasamununa wacaazya 
cibaki akupa musimbi wakwe kuti asame. Nobakasika munsi-munsi aakwabo musimbi, 
wakalomba kusiigwa mpoona awo. Musankwa wakalumba akuti bayakubonana buzuba 
butobela akuboola kumubweza kuti bakeendeende mudolopo. 
Buzuba bwakatobela, Mambuli wakaunka kwabo musimbi aciindi cacikasaalizi, kayi aŋanda 
wakaazyiba. Naakasika wakakonkomona mpoona bakaintu bakalaaŋanda bakajula 
akumwaanzya mweenzu kabotu-kabotu. Nkabela wakalomba kubonana a Selina. Bakaintu 
aaba bakaile kulanga ansi akulomba kuti anjile muŋanda Mambuli. Mbuli mweenzu oonse

67 
 
anjila muŋanda mwapunga kuba, inga kulazibaukwa kulanga muŋanda . Mwanaa musankwa 
eeci wakacicita limwi wakabona cifwanikiso ca Selina. 
Bakaintu nokwaaba kaindi kasyoonto bakatalika kwaambaula kabati, “Ooyo Selina 
ngomwaamba kuyanda kubona, kwainda myaka yosanwe kafwide.” Aaya makani Mambuli 
taakaasyoma akaniini. Wakabapandulwida kuti ngowakamuleta jilo masiku amootokala. 
Limwi bakaintu aaba bakayeeya kuti baunke bakamutondezye Selina nkwalede. 
Nobakasika kunamaumbwe, katasyomede musankwa, bakaunka akazikkidwe Selina nkabela 
atalaa cuumbwe bakajana akajekete kakwe Mambuli. Wakayoowa kapati akubaambila 
bakaintu aaba kuti wakamupede kajekete aaka mangolezya nkaambo wakafwide mpeyo. 
Wakayoowa kapati akubweza buyo kajekete kakwe. Nobajokela kukkomponi Mambuli 
taakali nguwe pe. 
Ooyu mulombe lyakamuleka cinicini, akulitongookela kuti masyaba-syaba amuletela 
tuyumya mate mukanwa. Naakajokela kwakwe wakazyi kumvwa mpeyo akutalika kuciswa. 
Kuzwa buzuba oobu, kunyina naakapona kumpeyo yakamunjila, limwi nokwaayinda myezi 
yobile, Mambuli wakafwa mucibbadela caku Mazabuka. Ma! Aaya masyaba-syaba!

Pandulwida basicikolo milawo eeyi: 
i. Ambila basicikolo kuti mazyina acigaminina taayelede kucinca pele aabuyo 
alakonzya kucincigwa. 
ii. Ambila basicikolo kuti twaandaanyo tweelede kubikkwa mpotweelede mpoona.

iv. Ambila basicikolo kuti kuli nzila zyinji zyibelesyegwa kusandulula cibalo kuzwa mu 
Chikuwa kutola mu Chitonga akuzwa mu Chitonga kutola mu Chikuwa mbuli:  
 Kusandulula bbala-abbala. Ooku nkusandulula bbala-abbala kuzwa mumulaka 
uusandundululwa kutola mumulaka umbi, Eeci cilabelesyegwa kuti mabala 
aabelesyedwe mumulaka uusandululwa taakatazyi alimwi aleendelana amabala aali 
mumulaka uusandululwa. 
 Kubweza bbala-abbala kulazumizyigwa notusandulula mabala mapati mukaambo. 
 Kubikka bbala limwi abusena bwabbala liliko. Eeci cilacitwa notusola kulesya 
kwiinduluka mabala ngamunya abelesyedwe kale. 
 Mazyina atajisi mazyina mu Chitonga alazuminzyigwa kwaalemba mbubona nkuti 
buyo ayelede kulembwa mu Chitonga-tonga mbuli; Kkompyuta, Tebule, deleensi, 
kkabati. 
 Mazyina buyo ngazyintu zyikonzya kusandululwa antela zyijisi mazyina mu Chikuwa  
amu Chitonga. 
 Bbala lipati ndyatazyi ncolyaamba sikusandulula, weelede kulisandulula mukaambo 
koonse. 
- 
Ambila basicikolo kuti beelede kubelesya mulaka uuluzi nobasandulula. 
Bulangizi Bweelede: Nzila zyiindene zyakusandulula zyabelesyegwa buyandika 
kusandululula zyibalo kuzwa mumulaka omwe kutola muli umwi akujosya.

Miyanda:  
Michelo, mebo ndilikkomene! Ndali kulanganya muzeezo wakutalika   
mpindu yakusambala zyakulya kunakutolela bantu kufwumbwa ooko 
nkobanoobede. Ndakalikukanza kuti kandinakujika zyakulya zyansiku 
nzyobakali kulya kaindi. 
Michelo:  
(Kaseka-seka) Miyanda, ooyo muzeezo mubotu kapati. Choma ndidolopo 
lipati. Aboobo ndamvwa kabotu kuteela kuti muntu musyoonto uuli mbuli 
nduwe kajisi mizeezo iili mbuli yeeyo. Ino uyeeya kwiipa zyina nzi mpindu 
yako? 
Miyanda: 
 Ndiya kuyiita kuti ‘Kulya Kabotu mu Choma’ ndiyanda kuti zyoonse 
nzyinoobelesyegwa kazyili zyeezyo zyijanika akuligwa muminzi. 
Michelo:  
Wacita kabotu! Izyina ‘Kulya Kabotu mu Choma’ lyeelela alimwi 
lilakwelelezya. Ono kondaambila mayale aamaccililanwa ako, uyakutalika 
buti? 
Miyanda:  
Ndakamvwa kale mpindu iikonzya kweenda kabotu kapati kubakubusyi. 
Ndilaamuzeezo wakutalika mpindu nsyoonto kwaakumana nkayikomenzye. 
Kumwi ndiyeeya kuti nkanjilane abamwi bantu kapati balimi mumpulazi 
abasikujika zyakulya zyakusambala. 
Michelo: 
 Eeyo njenzila mbotu musa. Nkutalika buyo asyoonto-syoonto kutegwa 
koyaabwiikomenzya mpindu yako mboyaabuya. Ino wayeeya inga wajana 
buyumu-yumu nzi? 
Miyanda:  
Ndiyoowede kuzundana kwampindu abasimakwebo bakatalika kaindi 
mudolopo omu. Alimwi tandizyi kabotu mbwenga ndakomenzya zyina 
lyampindu yangu akujana mweelwe wabasikuula mupati.  
Michelo: 
 Ooto twaambo tulamvwugwa musa. Kuzundana nkupati mumakwebo, pesi 
ulakonzya kubamba lwiindano kuti yebo zyakulya zyako kazyiimpene alimwi 
kazyiliitilila. Utakayoowi kulomba lugwasyo lwamali kuli basikukweletesya

Bulangizi Bweelede: Mabala anomoonwa abelesyegwa mutwaambo buluzi. 
 
Mutwe 2: Kusindinganya Kubala. 
Mutwe Musyoonto: Kubala Cakumvwisisisya. 
 Ntalisyo: Eeci cibeela cijatikizya kubala cakumvwisisisya. Basicikolo balabala 
zyibalo zyaandeene-andeene akuzyimvwisisisya, balaingula mibuzyo yaandeene 
akufwiinsya zyibalo zyitiibalwe. 
 Ceelede Kucitwa: Kubala zyibalo zyeelede mu Foomu 1. 
Cakucita 1: Kubala Zyibalo. 
Mwiiyi: 
- 
Ambila basicikolo kaambo antela kaano kajatikizya cibalo ncobayanda kubala. 
- 
Bape mbaakani zyakubala, mbuli kwiingula mibuzyo akufwiinsya cibalo. 
- 
Baambile ntalisyo antela mutwe wacibalo, atumwi buyo twaambo tuyandisi. 
- 
Ciindi cakubala, bazumizye basicikolo kuti balibalile cibalo naa baswiilizye kuli 
umwi sikupozya kubala. 
- 
Imika kubala cibalo mumasena mumwi muli twaambo tupati-pati akubabuzya 
mibuzyo naa kusalazya twaambo, akubakulwaizya kwaambaula zyatwaambo otu. 
- 
Babuzye mibuzyo ubone kuti naa balacimvwa ncobabala.

78 
 
- 
Bamana kubala balombe kuti bafwiinsye cibalo kwiinda mukwaamba twaambo 
tupati-pati tuzwa mucibalo. 
- 
Babuzye mibuzyo iiyanda bwiinguzi bufwaafwi ayiilya iyanda bwiinguzi bulamfwu 
bwakuyeeyesya. 
- 
Bagwasilizye kuswaanganya cibalo ncobabala azyicitika mumaumi aabo naa zyicitika 
munyika. 
- 
Ulakonzya kubabuzya mibuzyo muciindi cakwiiya (kutegwa uzyibe mpobeendela) 
naa kubapa cakucita kumamanino aaciiyo. 
Kuyungizya kumaccililanwa alaatala aawa, ulakonzya: 
1. Kutondezya basicikolo zyifwanikiso azyimwi buyo zyakweebela 
mukubagwasyilizya kuti bamvwe cibalo ncobabala. 
2. Ulakonzya kubelesya tusobano kutegwa basicikolo bamvwisisisye cibalo. 
 
                                  CIBALO (Ooyu mukozyanyo buyo) 
Bantu Mbobakagwasyigwa Kumapenzi Aayindene-indene. 
Kwakali mwana musankwa wakali kukkala mumunzi mwa Cheezya. Ooyu mulombe 
wakalijisi myaka makumi obilo. Zyina lyakwe wakali Kusoka. 
Wakali kaandulankanya kubazyali bakwe alimwi wakajisi bana bokwabo basankwa botatwe 
amusimbi omwe walo wakalaa zyina lya Mutinta.  Akati kabana bokwabo basankwa botatwe, 
kwakali Chimuka walo wakazyedwe myezi yakuzyalwa kaindilide, alimwi a Miyanda walo 
wakazyoozyalwa banyina nibakamana kuswaya muŋanga walo ngubakali kusyoma kubona 
bantu boonse. 
Ooyu muŋanga misamu yakwe yakali mikali cakunga kufwumbwa wakasilikwa kulinguwe 
waali kutola mpuwo mbotu. 
Makwebo aya akayandilila cakunga abasimbi abalo bakatalika kuboola kuyandaula 
lugwasyo. Bamwi bakali kuletelezya zyipego zyakulumba ciindi nobaboola kuletelezya 
beenzinyina kuti abalo bazyikusengulwe. 
Bakali kubula mali bakali kucincanizya zyitu mbuli; mpongo, ŋombe, mapopwe, lubulo, 
zyisani azyimwi buyo. 
Abalo bantu bakali kusyomwa kujatauka kwategwa micelo nkubali kwiijana.Miyanda 
naakamvwa mbuli mbwaakamitwa cakamweenzya mubili akwaamba kuti bantu balaanzila 
zyinji zyakuyandaula mali amilimo. 
Bulangizi Bweelede: Zyibalo zyamu Foomu 1 zyabalwa buyandika.

79 
 
Cakucita 2: Kwiingula mibuzyo yaandeene-andeene buyandika. 
Mwiiyi: 
- 
Ambila basicikolo kuti baingule mibuzyo iitobela: 
1. Ino Kusoka wakali kukkala mumunzi nzi? 
2. Kweendelanya amulembi wacaano eeci, Miyanda mwana wakazyalwa muciimo 
cabuti? 
3. Sena milimo yamuŋanga ooyu waambwa yakali mibotu naa yakali mibi. Kopandulula 
ncovwiilila boobo. 
4. Kaandulankanya muntu uli buti? 
5. Izyina lya Mutinta lipegwa mwana uli buti? 
6. Chimuka mwana wakazyalwa myezi yakutumbukwa kaindilide, ino mwana wazyalwa 
myezi yakutumbukwa kaitana sika wiitwa buti? 
Bulangizi Bweelede: Mibuzyo yaingulwa buluzi. 
Cakucita 3: Kufwiinsya zyibalo zyabalwa. 
(Ulakonzya kubelesya cibalo cili atala nociba cimbi buyo) 
Mwiiyi:  
- 
Ambila basicikolo kuti:  
i. 
Baambe bubotu bwakufwiinsya zyibalo. 
ii. 
Baambaule nzila zyakufwiinsya cibalo nzyobazyi. 
iii. 
Kufwiinsya kujisi buyo twaambo tupati-pati tujisi muzeezo wacibalo. 
iv. 
Twaambo twanomoonwa kuzwa mucibalo tatweelede kucinca muzeezo 
kweendelanya amubuzyo. 
v. 
Cibalo cafwiinsyigwa cilembwa mukampango komwe buyo. 
Ntaamu Zyitobelwa 
i. 
Nkubala cibalo ciindi cakusaanguna kutegwa uulemba aciteelele. 
ii. 
Kubala ciindi cabili kutegwa ujane twaambo tupati-pati tuyandika. 
iii. 
Kubikka twaambo mumatobelanwa ayelede. 
iv. 
Kubala mweelwe wamabala kutegwa naa waindilila twaambo tuteelede 
tuzwe. 
Zyilangilwa kuli sicikolo  
i. 
Kucizyiba kubala akulemba. 
ii. 
Kumvwisisisya ncabala antela cabalwa. 
iii. 
Kuzyiba zyibeela zyijisi twaambo ntwayanda mucibalo. 
iv. 
Kucizyiba kunomoona twaambo akutulemba apepa limbi.

80 
 
v. 
Kucizyiba kuti mikozyanyo yapegwa mucibalo tayeelede kubamba 
kaambo. 
vi. 
Kucizyiba kututobelanya twaambo kubelesya manambala, tweengo 
antela tudombwi. 
Bulangizi Bweelede: Zyibalo zyabalwa zyafwiinsyigwa buluzi. 
Cakucita 4: Kwaamba zyibalo zyabalwa mumabala abo. 
Mwiiyi:  
- 
Ambila basicikolo kufwiinsya cibalo cabalwa mumabala abo. 
Bulangizi Bweelede: Zyibalo zyabalwa zyafwiinsigwa mumabala abo buyandika. 
Cakucita 5: Kubandika mabala ncaamba. 
Mwiiyi: 
- 
Lemba mabala atupepa. 
- 
Bikka basicikolo mutubunga. 
- 
Kopa basicikolo tupepa tulembedwe mabala. 
- 
Ambila tubunga kubandika mabala ngotwapegwa. 
- 
Ambila tubunga akamwi kupa bupanduluzi bwamabala ngotwabandika. 
- 
Amubandike akuzuminana kubupanduluzi bwapa basicikolo akubambulula 
mweelede. 
Bulangizi Bweelede: Mabala ncaamba abandikwa buyandika. 
 
Mutwe 3: Kubala Kwakuyandilila 
Mutwe Musyoonto: Kubala 
 Ntalisyo: Eeci cibeela cilanganya kubala kwakuyandilila, ncobeleede kucita ntaamu 
antaamu alimwi akufwiinsya zyibalo zyaandeene. 
 Ceelede Kucitwa: Kubala zyibalo zyamu Foomu 1 zyijisi zyaano zyaandeene-
andeene. 
Cakucita 1: Kubala zyibalo zyaandeene-andeene. 
Mwiiyi: 
- 
Bamba mbaakani akwaamba bubotu bwakubala kwazyibalo zyaandeene mbuli; 
kuzyiba kubala kabotu, kuzyiba mabala ncaamba, kukonzya kumvwisisisya kubala 
akuba aluzyibo lunji. 
- 
Sala zyibalo zyakubala mbuli; zyikondelezya, zyeendelana alwiiyo lwabo azyilaa 
njiisyo zyibotu.

81 
 
- 
Bamba busena bwakubalila kwiinda mukujana busena buli kabotu, butakwe kuyobeka 
alimwi kakuli mumuni uuli kabotu. 
Ciindi cakubala: 
- 
Ambila basicikolo kubala balikke cakaumuumu kakunyina kubatyokezya. 
- 
Ambila basicikolo kuti tabeelele kutyokezya banikubala ccita buyo mwiiyi ayanda 
kuzyiba mpobateene naa kuba akubandika kusyoonto. 
- 
Kulwaizya basicikolo kubala kumwi kabalemba twaambo tupati-pati akupa 
bupanduluzi kubeenzinyina. 
Nobamana kubala:  
- 
Kulwaizya basicikolo nzyobabala, nzyobakkomanina, nzyobayiya azyabapenzya. 
- 
Kulwaizya basicikolo kubandika zyijatikizya mibandi yabukkale kwiinda muluzyibo 
ndobajana muzyibalo nzyobabala. 
- 
Kulwaizya basicikolo kubelesya nzila zyaandeene zyijatikizya kubala. 
Bulangizyi Bweelede: Zyibalo zyaandeene-andeene zyabalwa buyandika. 
Cakucta 2: Kufwiinsya zyibalo zyabalwa kwiinda mukwaambaula. 
Mwiiyi: 
- 
Kobapa zyibalo basicikolo zyaandeene-andeene. 
- 
Bape ciindi cakubala basicikolo. 
- 
Ambila basicikolo aumwi kuzubulula cibalo ncaabala mubufwaafwi. 
- 
Ambila basicikolo kukanana bubotu mbobajana aumwi mucibalo ncaabala 
- 
Kulwaizya basicikolo kujana ciindi cakulibalila zyibalo zyaandeene-andeene. 
Bulangizi Bweelede: Zyibalo zyabalwa zyafwiinsigwa kwiinda mukwaambaula buluzi.

Mutwe 2: Maambilambali. 
Mutwe Musyoonto: Twaambyo.  
 Ntalisyo: Eeci cibeela cilanganya twaambyo ncotwaamba ambotubelesyegwa. 
 Ceelede Kucitwa: Belesya twaambyo 
Cakucita 1: Kubandika twaambyo ncotwaamba ambotubelesyegwa. 
Mwiiyi: 
- 
Pandulula twaambyo ncotwaamba ambotubelesyegwa. 
i. 
Twaaambyo ntwaambo tubelesyegwa muciimo amumulaka ngotakonzyi   
kufwambaana kumvwa nkaambo kakuti caambwa inga cilisisidwe. 
ii. 
Twaambyo tulijisi milimo minji mbuli: kulaya, kucenjezya, kulumbaizya, 
kufwubaazya akutongooka. 
- 
Lemba twaambyo tobatibandike basicikolo. 
Bulangizi Bweelede: Twaambyo ncotwaamba ambotubelesyegwa bwabandikwa bweelede. 
Cakucita 2: Kwaapaula twaambyo kweendelanya ambotubelesyegwa. 
Mwiiyi: 
- 
Lemba twaambyo abboodi cakudyobengana. 
- 
Ambila basicikolo kutwaapaula kweendelanya ambotubelesyegwa. 
Bulangizi Bweelede: Twaambyo twaapaulwa buluzi kweendelanya ambotubelesyegwa. 
Cakucita 3: Kujana twaambyo tweelede kubelesegwa muzyiindi zyeelede. 
Mwiiyi: 
- 
Ambila basicikolo kuti akamwi kaambyo kuli ciindi ncokeelede kubelesyegwa. 
- 
Lemba zyiindi zyaandeene- andeene notubelesyegwa twaambyo. 
- 
Ambila basicikolo kujana twaambyo tunga twabelesyegwa muzyiindi zyalembwa 
abboodi. 
Bulangizi Bweelede: Twaambyo tweelede kubelesegwa muzyiindi zyaandeene twajanwa 
buluzi.

84 
 
Cakucita 4: Kujana zyiindi zyeelede motunga twabelesegwa twaambyo tweelede. 
Mwiiyi: 
- 
Lemba twaambyo atupepa. 
- 
Bikka basicikolo mutubunga. 
- 
Bape tupepa tulembedwe twaambyo. 
- 
Ambila tubunga kujana zyiindi motunga twabelesyegwa twaambyo oto. 
Bulangizi Bweelede: Zyiindi zyeelede motunga twabesyegwa twaambyo zyajanwa buluzi.  
 
KUSANDULULA 
Mutwe: Kusandulula. 
Mutwe Musyoonto: Mbokusandululwa.  
 Ntalisyo: Eeci cibeela cilanganya kusandulula, mbokusandululwa 
azyilanganyizyigwa nokusandululwa. 
 Ceelede Kucitwa: Kubelesya nzila zyinji kusandulula cibalo kuzwa mu Chikuwa 
kutola mu Chitonga akuzwa mu Chitonga kutola mu Chikuwa. 
Cakucita: Kusandulula cibalo kuzwa mu Chikuwa kutola mu Chitonga akuzwa mu 
Chitonga kutola mu Chikuwa. 
Mwiiyi: 
- 
Ambila basicikolo kuti mazyina aacigaminina taayelede kucinca pele aabuyo 
alakonzya kucinca. 
- 
Ambila basicikolo kuti twaandaanyo tweelede kubikkwa mpotweelede.  
- 
Ambila basicikolo kuti ciindi tacicinci. 
- 
Ambila basicikolo kuti kuli nzila zyinji zyibelesyegwa kusandulula cibalo kuzwa mu 
Chikuwa kutola mu Chitonga akuzwa mu Chitonga kutola mu Chikuwa mbuli: 
i. 
Kubelesya bbala abusena bwabbala litateeleleki (substitution). Eeci cilengwa 
cilacitwa muciindi nokunyina mabala akonzya kubelesyegwa mumulaka 
mwaatolwa. 
ii. 
Kusandulula bbala-abbala: Kupandulula kubelesya bbala-abbala kuzwa 
mumulaka uusandululwa kutola kumulaka umwi uusandululwa. Kubweza 
bbala-abbala kulazumizyigwa notusandulula mabala mapati mukaambo. 
iii. 
Kusandulula kubelesya mabala akulomba abelesyegwa-belesyegwa 
(borrowing): Eeci cilacitika kutegwa uubala naa uuswiilila afwambaane 
kumvwa caambwa. 
iv. 
Kusandulula kubelesya mabala azwa mumulaka umbi aatambulika 
amumulaka wabili (loaning). Eeci cilengwa cilabelesyegwa nikwabula bbala 
lyakubelesya mumulaka ooyo.

85 
 
v. 
Kusandulula mabala mbwaalimvwisya mumulaka umwi akwaabala 
mbubwena mumulaka wabili antela kakuli buyo kwiimpana kusyoonto. 
Mbuli: John – Johane, Peter – petulo (Transliteration). 
vi. 
Kusandulula kwakupandulula (Description). Eeci cilabelesyegwa nikwabula 
bbala mumulaka wabili lyeendelana alili mumulaka wakutaanguna, nkabela 
walipandulula buyo kutegwa kaambo kateeleleke. 
vii. 
Kusandulula kwaatala-tala (Generalisatioon). Eeci cilabelesyegwa 
mukusandulula kaambo kakunyina kutonkomana, pele wasandulula buyo 
caatala-tala.
